checklist_items.evidence_required: User confirmation logs and wallet transaction ARNs showing verified details.

checklist_items.title: Configure secure, trusted RPC endpoints and educate users on verifying endpoint authenticity
checklist_items.description: Ensure users connect their wallets only to official, verified RPC endpoints and are educated on recognizing malicious or compromised nodes to prevent MitM attacks and data leaks.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: User connects to a malicious RPC endpoint that logs or tampers with traffic.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Use only official RPC endpoints, verify URLs, and run a personal node or trusted relay.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Configuration records showing connection to verified RPCs and user education materials.

checklist_items.title: Implement deployment verification and code review for Reward Vault smart contracts
checklist_items.description: Prior to deployment, conduct rigorous security audits, formal verification, and code review to identify and remediate vulnerabilities and prevent exploits due to code flaws.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Reward Vault contracts might contain exploitable vulnerabilities.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Audited and verified smart contracts with formal proofs where feasible.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit reports, formal verification results, and deployment checklists.

checklist_items.title: Deploy only verified and audited smart contracts with proper access controls
checklist_items.description: Ensure all critical smart contracts, especially those controlling assets and administrative functions, are deployed only after thorough security audits and include role-based access control with multi-signature governance.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Reward Vaults might be vulnerable to unauthorized control if not properly secured.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Use multi-signature governance, limit admin privileges, and audit access controls.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Deployment logs, role assignment records, and audit reports.

checklist_items.title: Implement strong authentication mechanisms for RFRV submissions to prevent impersonation
checklist_items.description: Ensure that only verified identities can submit RFRV proposals, such as linking forum accounts to on-chain identity or using multi-factor authentication.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Governance Forum lacks strong authentication mechanisms to verify the identity of the user submitting the RFRV.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement strong authentication (e.g., linking forum account to on-chain identity, SSO)
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit logs showing verified identities linked to forum accounts.

checklist_items.title: Validate whitelist status of Reward Vaults before processing emissions
checklist_items.description: Ensure smart contracts handling $BGT emissions verify that the target Reward Vault is whitelisted and active before transferring funds.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The system (e.g., Distributor Contract 214) might not robustly check the status/validity of a target Reward Vault before attempting to send emissions.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Strict on-chain verification that target Reward Vaults are whitelisted and active before emissions are processed.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Transaction logs showing emissions only directed to whitelisted vaults.

checklist_items.title: Conduct security audits and formal verification of Reward Vault smart contracts
checklist_items.description: Perform comprehensive security assessments of Reward Vault contracts to identify and fix vulnerabilities that could be exploited for tampering or denial of service.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Reward Vault contracts deployed by protocols could contain exploitable vulnerabilities.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Rigorous security audits, formal verification, and bug bounty programs for Reward Vault contracts.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit reports and formal verification proof documents.

checklist_items.title: Ensure transaction signing occurs on secure hardware wallets with explicit verification of parameters
checklist_items.description: Use hardware wallets that display all transaction details during signing to prevent tampering with transaction parameters such as amounts or recipients.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The User's (Actor 1) wallet or interaction environment can be compromised to alter transaction data before signing.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Require hardware wallets and user verification of transaction details before signing.
checklist_items.evidence_required: User confirmation logs showing explicit verification of transaction details.
checklist_items.owner: User Education and Wallet Support Team

checklist_items.title: Implement regular security audits and formal verification of deposit, stake, and harvest functions to prevent tampering and denial of service
checklist_items.description: Assess smart contract code responsible for deposit, staking, and reward distribution to identify and fix vulnerabilities that could be exploited for malicious tampering or DoS.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Reward vault and staking contracts might contain exploitable vulnerabilities due to improper implementation.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Schedule regular audits, formal verification, and incorporate bug bounty programs for these contracts.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit reports, formal verification results, vulnerability disclosures.

checklist_items.title: Establish secure private key management practices for validators and critical authorities
checklist_items.description: Use hardware security modules (HSMs), multi-signature schemes, and operational procedures to safeguard private keys used for validator actions, emission signing, and governance privileges.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Validation keys and governance keys can be compromised if not properly secured.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement HSMs, multi-sig controls, periodic key rotation, and operational security protocols.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Key management audit logs, operational procedures documentation.

checklist_items.title: Verify official contract addresses and publish them through verified channels
checklist_items.description: Publish and maintain a list of official smart contract addresses to prevent users from interacting with spoofed or malicious contracts.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Users may interact with malicious contracts if official addresses are not well disseminated and verified.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Official address publication, verification protocols, and user education.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Published address lists, audit logs of address distribution.

checklist_items.title: Verify that forum account require wallet-based or verified on-chain identity for RFRV submissions
checklist_items.description: Check if the Governance Forum enforces wallet-based login or on-chain identity verification for users submitting RFRV proposals.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Systems or processes acting on BGT Foundation's review decisions lack robust mechanisms to verify the authenticity of such decisions.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement strong authentication (e.g., digital signatures, on-chain verification) for all official communications and actions taken by the BGT Foundation.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit logs showing authentication methods for RFRV submissions and review decisions.

checklist_items.title: Ensure the use of cryptographically signed on-chain proposals for governance and RFRV submissions
checklist_items.description: Validate that all governance proposals and RFRV submissions are signed with private keys of authorized entities and recorded on-chain.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Weak attribution on the forum could allow a protocol to disown a controversial or failed RFRV submission.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Require cryptographic signatures on all proposals and submissions to ensure non-repudiation.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Verify signatures on proposals match registered official keys.

checklist_items.title: Implement secure, confidential channels for off-chain communication among BGT Foundation members
checklist_items.description: Establish encrypted and access-controlled communication channels for the BGT Foundation members to discuss sensitive review decisions and proposals.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Leakage of pre-launch project details, proprietary information, or identified security vulnerabilities from RFRVs could harm applying projects or provide unfair advantages.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Use end-to-end encrypted messaging platforms and enforce operational security policies among BGT Foundation members.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Operational security policies; encrypted communication logs.

checklist_items.title: Maintain an on-chain, immutable log of all governance proposal creation and review actions
checklist_items.description: Ensure that every proposal, review, approval, and decision is recorded on-chain in a transparent and tamper-proof manner.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Actions on a public blockchain are inherently non-repudiable due to transaction history.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Design governance actions to emit clear, unalterable events and store critical data on-chain.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Blockchain transaction logs and event records.

checklist_items.title: Implement strong on-chain identity verification for RFRV submissions
checklist_items.description: Ensure that only verified on-chain identities can submit RFRVs on the governance forum.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Governance Forum lacks strong authentication mechanisms to verify the identity of the user submitting the RFRV.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement robust on-chain identity verification (e.g., digital signatures, verified wallet associations) during RFRV submission process.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit logs showing verified on-chain identities linked at the time of RFRV submission.

checklist_items.title: Ensure all reward distribution and incentive claim processes use validated and secure off-chain proof mechanisms
checklist_items.description: Validate the integrity and security of off-chain proof generation for incentive claims, and ensure proper validation on-chain.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The backend service generating proofs for incentive claims could be compromised or have vulnerabilities.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Secure the proof generation service, implement on-chain validation and multi-party consensus for proofs.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit records of proof generation process, verifiable signatures, and on-chain validation logs.

checklist_items.title: Verify the whitelisting status of Reward Vaults before allowing emissions or interactions
checklist_items.description: Implement strict on-chain verification to ensure Reward Vaults are whitelisted and active before directing emissions or transferring assets.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: A validator might maliciously or accidentally direct emissions to non-whitelisted or faulty vaults.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Integrate whitelist checks within emission directing contracts and interfaces.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Transaction logs showing actual whitelist verification during emission transactions.

checklist_items.title: Secure private keys of validators and critical actors using hardware security modules (HSMs) or multisignatures
checklist_items.description: Ensure that private keys used for signing emissions, proposals, and administrative actions are stored securely in hardware modules or protected by multisignature schemes.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Validator's private key used for signing emission direction transactions can be compromised.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Use hardware security modules, multisignature schemes, and operational security best practices for key storage.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit logs showing key access controls and multisignature signing records.

checklist_items.title: Implement multi-party approval for governance proposals and critical changes
checklist_items.description: Require multiple independent approvals or signatures before executing governance proposals to prevent single-actor malicious actions.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The governance system can be exploited if a single entity can approve proposals without oversight.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Governance protocols require multi-party approvals, thresholds, and transparent audits.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Governance approval records, signatures, and audit logs demonstrating multi-party consent.

checklist_items.title: Implement strong authentication linking forum accounts to on-chain identities
checklist_items.description: Check if forum users submitting RFRVs are verified through on-chain identity to prevent spoofing or impersonation.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Governance Forum lacks strong authentication mechanisms to verify the identity of the user submitting the RFRV.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement strong authentication (e.g., linking forum account to on-chain identity, SSO)
checklist_items.evidence_required: Screenshot or audit log showing linked on-chain identity at login.

checklist_items.title: Enforce on-chain verification of Reward Vault whitelisting status before emission payouts
checklist_items.description: Ensure that all Reward Vaults receiving emissions are verified and whitelisted on-chain to prevent directing funds to malicious or unverified vaults.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Reward Vault contract might not properly authenticate that the caller is the designated Token Manager for the specific vault and incentive token, or the Token Manager's private key is compromised.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Ensure strong authentication (e.g., msg.sender validation against a stored Token Manager address) in the Reward Vault contract for all sensitive functions. Promote secure private key management practices for Token Managers.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Smart contract audit reports verifying access control enforcement on reward distribution functions.

checklist_items.title: Verify transaction parameters before signing in wallets during staking, rewards claiming, and redemption
checklist_items.description: Users should review all transaction details within their trusted wallet interface to prevent tampering or misexecution of staking, claiming, or redemption activities.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The user does not meticulously verify all transaction details in their wallet before signing.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Use hardware wallets, carefully review transaction details in wallet's trusted display, and promote user education on transaction verification.
checklist_items.evidence_required: User confirmation logs or screenshots showing verified transaction details before signing.

checklist_items.title: Implement IP whitelisting and secure communication channels for RPC endpoints
checklist_items.description: Prevent MitM and unauthorized access by ensuring users connect to trusted, verified RPC endpoints over secure channels (e.g., HTTPS, VPN).
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Attacker can perform a Man-in-the-Middle (MitM) attack due to unencrypted or poorly secured RPC communications.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Enforce HTTPS for all RPC communications, users should ensure their network connection is secure, and wallet warnings for suspicious endpoints.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Network security audit reports of RPC endpoints, user reports of connection issues.

checklist_items.title: Use official, verified smart contract addresses and prevent deployment of malicious or spoofed contracts
checklist_items.description: Protocols should publish and verify their official contract addresses and educate users to interact only with these addresses to prevent spoofing and impersonation.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Attackers can deploy deceptive contracts and create convincing phishing pages; users may not verify contract addresses correctly.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Protocols should clearly publicize their official smart contract addresses through multiple secure channels. Educate users on verifying contract addresses before interacting.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Domain registration and published address lists; user verification logs.

checklist_items.title: Implement strong authentication linking forum accounts to on-chain identities
checklist_items.description: Verify that the Governance Forum requires users to authenticate via linked on-chain wallets before submitting RFRV proposals.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Governance Forum lacks strong authentication mechanisms to verify the identity of the user submitting the RFRV.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement strong authentication (e.g., linking forum account to on-chain identity, SSO)
checklist_items.evidence_required: Screenshot or audit log showing linked on-chain identity at login.

checklist_items.title: Ensure on-chain verification of Reward Vault whitelisting status before emissions
checklist_items.description: Add on-chain checks to confirm Reward Vaults are whitelisted and active before distributing $BGT incentives.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The system (e.g., Distributor Contract 214) might not robustly check the status/validity of a target Reward Vault before attempting to send emissions.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement strict on-chain verification that target Reward Vaults are whitelisted and active before emissions are processed.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Transaction logs demonstrating whitelist checks during emission transactions.

checklist_items.title: Secure Validator private keys used for signing emission directives and proposals
checklist_items.description: Utilize hardware wallets, multisignature schemes, and operational security best practices for validator keys to prevent compromise.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: A Validator's private key used for signing emission direction transactions can be compromised.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Secure validator key management (e.g., HSMs, robust operational security). Optional: Implement a cooldown period or multi-signature requirement for changing emission directions.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit logs of key management procedures and hardware wallet usage.

checklist_items.title: Implement multi-factor authentication and wallet security for DAO members managing critical roles
checklist_items.description: Require MFA, hardware wallets, and secure operational procedures for DAO members involved in governance and proposal creation.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Weak access controls, vulnerabilities in systems used by the BGT Foundation, or compromised credentials could allow an unauthorized individual to gain the privileges of a BGT Foundation member.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Enforce strong, multi-factor authentication (MFA) for all BGT Foundation members' accounts. Implement the principle of least privilege. Regular access audits.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Access logs demonstrating MFA enforcement and regular audits.

checklist_items.title: Use verified official links and contract addresses for all dApp interactions to prevent spoofing
checklist_items.description: Educate users and implement UI safeguards to ensure that all interactions (staking, bridging, claiming) occur only through verified URLs and contract addresses.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: User cannot reliably distinguish a fake interface or contract from the legitimate one.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Always use official, bookmarked links; verify contract addresses before interaction; wallet warnings for phishing sites.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Screenshots of user verifying URLs and contract addresses; documentation of official links.

checklist_items.title: Implement strong authentication linking forum accounts to on-chain identities
checklist_items.description: Verify that forum users submitting RFRVs are authenticated through reliable on-chain identity verification methods.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Governance Forum lacks strong authentication mechanisms to verify the identity of the user submitting the RFRV.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement strong authentication (e.g., linking forum account to on-chain identity, SSO)
checklist_items.evidence_required: Screenshot or audit log showing linked on-chain identity at login.

checklist_items.title: Enforce whitelist verification of Reward Vaults before emissions are directed
checklist_items.description: Ensure that only Reward Vaults that are properly whitelisted and verified are eligible to receive $BGT emissions, preventing directs to malicious or non-compliant vaults.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: A validator might maliciously or accidentally direct emissions to a Reward Vault (209) that is not properly whitelisted or is faulty.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Strict on-chain verification that target Reward Vaults are whitelisted and active before emissions are processed.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit logs or transaction histories showing whitelist checks during emission execution.

checklist_items.title: Secure validator key management for emission direction transactions
checklist_items.description: Implement robust storage, operational procedures, and multisig controls to protect validator private keys used for signing emission directives to prevent spoofing and unauthorized control.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: A Validator's private key used for signing emission direction transactions can be compromised.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Secure validator key management (e.g., HSMs, hardware wallets). Implement multi-signature and secure operational procedures.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Key management audit logs and key storage policies.

checklist_items.title: Verify authenticity of RPC endpoints and establish secure connections
checklist_items.description: Ensure users connect only to verified, trusted RPC endpoints using HTTPS to prevent spoofing and MitM attacks.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: User connects to an RPC endpoint operated by an entity that logs and potentially misuses user metadata.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Use official, verified RPC endpoints; enforce HTTPS; educate users on verifying endpoint URLs.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Configuration audits showing only approved RPC endpoints are used.
checklist_items.owner: User Education and Network Security Team

checklist_items.title: Implement anti-police-dos protections for critical smart contracts
checklist_items.description: Apply rate limiting, circuit breakers, and performance optimization to smart contracts involved in reward distribution, staking, and redemption to prevent DoS attacks.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The reward vault contract (209) is susceptible to DoS vectors due to bugs or poor design.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Thorough testing, audits, inclusion of safeguards like circuit breakers or pause functions.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit reports, test logs, testing plans.

checklist_items.title: Ensure off-chain proof generation process is secured and validated smartly
checklist_items.description: Protect the backend service generating proofs for incentives, implement cryptographic validation, and consider decentralized proof mechanisms.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The backend service generating proofs for BGTIncentiveDistributor is compromised or has vulnerabilities.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Secure backend infrastructure, employ cryptographically secure proof validation within smart contracts, use decentralization where feasible.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Code reviews, cryptographic validation logs, audit reports.

checklist_items.title: Implement strong authentication tying forum submissions to on-chain identities
checklist_items.description: Verify that the Governance Forum requires users to authenticate using their blockchain wallet or other cryptographically secure methods before submitting RFRVs.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Governance Forum lacks strong authentication mechanisms to verify the identity of the user submitting the RFRV.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement strong authentication (e.g., linking forum account to on-chain identity, SSO)
checklist_items.evidence_required: Screenshot or audit log showing linked on-chain identity at login.

checklist_items.title: Enforce on-chain verification of Reward Vault whitelisting status before emissions transfer
checklist_items.description: Ensure that the Reward Distributor Contract verifies that target Reward Vaults are whitelisted and active on-chain before executing emission transfers.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The system (e.g., Distributor Contract 214) might not robustly check the status/validity of a target Reward Vault before processing emissions.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement strict on-chain verification that target Reward Vaults are whitelisted and active before emission transfer.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit logs showing verification steps during emission transactions.

checklist_items.title: Secure private keys of validators using hardware security modules and multi-signature wallets
checklist_items.description: Ensure validator keys used for signing emission directives are stored in hardware security modules or multi-sig wallets, with strict operational security to prevent compromise.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Validator's private key used for signing emission direction transactions can be compromised.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Secure validator key management (e.g., HSMs, robust operational security). Optional: Implement a cooldown period or multi-signature requirement for changing emission directions.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Key management policies, hardware key deployment records.

checklist_items.title: Implement blockchain-based multisignature mechanisms for critical governance actions
checklist_items.description: Utilize multisignature schemes (e.g., 5-of-9 Guardian signatures) to authorize proposal cancellations, ensuring no single guardian can unilaterally perform high-impact governance operations.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Timelock Contract's `cancel` function might contain a bug or be improperly validated.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement and audit multisig validation logic for proposal cancellations.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Multisig transaction logs, verification scripts.

checklist_items.title: Establish secure communication channels for Guardian coordination and off-chain review processes
checklist_items.description: Use encrypted, authenticated channels (e.g., PGP, secure messaging platforms) for Guardian communication to prevent leaks of cancellation intents or review decisions.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Leakage of Guardians' intent to cancel a proposal before the action is taken, potentially through insecure off-chain channels.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Establish secure and confidential communication channels for Guardian coordination.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Communication protocols and audit logs of Guardian communications.

checklist_items.title: Implement voting rights and proposal creation controls with on-chain validation of voter eligibility
checklist_items.description: Smart contracts should verify the proposer’s $BGT delegation or stake at proposal submission time, ensuring proposals can only be created if the user holds sufficient voting power.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: There is a vulnerability in the Governance Contracts (212) related to determining voting power or proposal creation eligibility.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement rigorous on-chain verification of proposer’s $BGT balance or delegation status at proposal submission.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Proposal submission transaction logs, smart contract verification scripts.

checklist_items.title: Implement strong authentication mechanisms for forum users submitting RFRV proposals.
checklist_items.description: Ensure that users are verified through cryptographic linkage to their on-chain identity to prevent impersonation or spoofing of submissions.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Governance Forum lacks strong authentication mechanisms to verify the identity of the user submitting the RFRV.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement strong authentication (e.g., linking forum account to on-chain identity, SSO)
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit logs showing verified user identities at submission time.

checklist_items.title: Enforce whitelist and validation checks for reward vaults before emission transfers.
checklist_items.description: Verify that reward vaults are whitelisted and active during the emission process to prevent directing funds to malicious or unverified vaults.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Validator can direct emissions to any vault without on-chain validation.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement on-chain verification of vault whitelist status prior to transfer.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Transaction logs showing whitelist verification steps during emission transfer.

checklist_items.title: Perform rigorous security audits and formal verification on Reward Vault contracts before deployment.
checklist_items.description: Ensure that all Reward Vaults undergo comprehensive security assessments to identify and fix vulnerabilities that could be exploited for tampering or DoS.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Reward Vaults may contain vulnerabilities due to complex logic or third-party code integrations.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Require auditing and formal verification before whitelisting Reward Vaults.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit reports and verification certificates for Reward Vault contracts.

checklist_items.title: Implement multi-signature and timelock controls for administrative functions of Reward Vaults.
checklist_items.description: Secure admin operations by requiring multiple authorized signatures and enforce timelocks to prevent rapid malicious changes.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Admin controls are vulnerable if keys are compromised or control is single-signature.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Use multi-signature wallets and enforce timelocked administrative actions.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Configuration records of multisig and timelock parameters.

checklist_items.title: Require secure key management practices for Validator private keys.
checklist_items.description: Ensure that private keys used for signing emissions, proposals, and block proposals are stored and operated within secure hardware modules or multi-party protocols.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Validator keys are susceptible to theft if improperly managed.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Use hardware security modules and multi-party custodianship for Validator keys.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Key management policies and hardware module audit logs.

checklist_items.title: Enforce rigorous validation and monitoring of deposit and withdrawal transaction parameters for Reward Vaults and staking contracts.
checklist_items.description: Implement checks on transaction parameters like amount, recipient address, and token amounts to prevent tampering or malicious inputs.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Users or attackers may manipulate transaction data before submitting to contracts.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Smart contract enforce parameter validation and implement user verification steps.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Test logs demonstrating validation steps and incident reports.

checklist_items.title: Secure communication channels between user interfaces and smart contracts to prevent tampering with transaction data.
checklist_items.description: Use encrypted, signed, or otherwise secure methods for transmitting transaction parameters from UI to wallets and from wallets to smart contracts.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Users or attackers may alter data in transit or via compromised interfaces.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement end-to-end encryption, use of trusted wallets, and signing verification.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Transport layer security configurations and transaction authenticity logs.

checklist_items.title: Enforce strong authentication for forum users submitting RFRVs
checklist_items.description: Verify that the Governance Forum requires users to authenticate via secure on-chain identities or cryptographic signatures to prevent impersonation and spoofing.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Governance Forum lacks strong authentication mechanisms to verify the identity of the user submitting the RFRV.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement strong authentication (e.g., linking forum account to on-chain identity, SSO)
checklist_items.evidence_required: Screenshot or audit log showing linked on-chain identity at login.

checklist_items.title: Implement end-to-end integrity verification for governance proposal data
checklist_items.description: Ensure that all governance proposals submitted are cryptographically signed or recorded on-chain to prevent tampering or unauthorized modifications.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Governance Contract does not have mechanisms to verify the authenticity and integrity of proposal data.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Use cryptographic signatures or on-chain recording of proposals
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit logs showing proposal signatures or on-chain proposal records.

checklist_items.title: Secure private keys of validator operators with hardware wallets and operational security
checklist_items.description: Require validator operators to use hardware wallets and secure key management practices when signing emission and delegation transactions to prevent spoofing from compromised keys.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Validator's private keys used for signing emission and delegation transactions are stored insecurely or are vulnerable to theft.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Use hardware wallets, multi-signature schemes, and operational security best practices for key management.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit logs of key management procedures and hardware wallet usage policies.

checklist_items.title: Verify the whitelisting status of Reward Vaults before directing emissions or rewards
checklist_items.description: Implement on-chain checks to ensure that only Reward Vaults whitelisted and deemed secure receive $BGT emissions, preventing directed rewards to malicious or faulty vaults.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Validator or authorized entities may direct $BGT emissions to non-whitelisted or malicious vaults.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Add on-chain verification in the emission distribution contracts to check vault whitelists
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit reports of emission contracts with whitelist checks.

checklist_items.title: Implement secure transaction signing environment for validators and key managers
checklist_items.description: Require use of hardware wallets or secure signing environments for all critical transactions, including emission directives, delegation, and reward distributions, to prevent tampering and impersonation.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Validator or operator signing key is stored in an insecure environment susceptible to compromise.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Use hardware wallets, multi-signature schemes, and secure signing procedures.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Operational procedures documentation and compliance logs.

checklist_items.title: Deploy comprehensive security audits and formal verification for reward distribution and incentive contracts
checklist_items.description: Subject all reward vaults, incentive distribution, and related smart contracts to rigorous security audits, code review, and formal verification to identify and fix potential vulnerabilities that could be exploited for tampering or unauthorized control.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Reward Vaults and incentive contracts may contain exploitable vulnerabilities.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Engage reputable audit firms, conduct formal verification, and implement bug bounty programs.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit reports, formal verification certificates, and bug bounty submissions.

checklist_items.title: Use cryptographically verifiable signatures or blockchain recordings for proposal and transaction attribution
checklist_items.description: Ensure that all significant proposals, emissions, and transactions are signed with cryptographically verifiable signatures or recorded on-chain to prevent repudiation and enable auditability.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Proposal submissions or transactions lack irrefutable attribution mechanisms.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Require cryptographic signatures or on-chain proposal logs with linked identities.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Signed proposal records or on-chain logs with digital signatures.

checklist_items.title: Implement strong authentication and verification for forum RFRV submissions
checklist_items.description: Check if the governance forum requires users to authenticate via verified on-chain identities before submitting RFRV.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Governance Forum lacks strong authentication mechanisms to verify the identity of the user submitting the RFRV.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement strong authentication (e.g., linking forum account to on-chain identity, SSO)
checklist_items.evidence_required: Screenshot or audit log showing linked on-chain identity at login.

checklist_items.title: Validate whitelisted status of Reward Vaults before directing incentives
checklist_items.description: Ensure that the Reward Vault contract verifies its whitelist status before receiving $BGT emissions to prevent directing funds to untrusted or malicious vaults.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: A validator might maliciously or accidentally direct emissions to a Reward Vault that is not properly whitelisted or is faulty.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Strict on-chain verification that target Reward Vaults are whitelisted and active before emissions are processed. Clear UI for validators showing vault status. Monitoring for emissions to problematic or non-whitelisted vaults.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Logs showing verification steps during emission transactions.

checklist_items.title: Secure private keys of validators with hardware wallets and multi-signature procedures
checklist_items.description: Verify that validators managing critical operations such as $BGT emission directions use hardware wallets and multi-signature controls to prevent unauthorized malicious activity.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: A Validator's private key is compromised, allowing an attacker to spoof emission directives.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Secure validator key management (e.g., HSMs, robust operational security). Optional: Implement a cooldown period or multi-signature requirement for changing emission directions.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit reports of key management practices and key access logs.

checklist_items.title: Implement robust access controls and role-based permissions for reward management contracts
checklist_items.description: Ensure that only authorized personnel or multisignature groups can invoke critical functions such as adding incentives or changing rates in the reward contracts.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Reward Vault contract's access control for functions like adding incentives or setting rates is flawed or bypassable.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement and rigorously audit robust access control mechanisms (e.g., role-based access specific to the designated Token Manager) in the Reward Vault smart contract. Follow the principle of least privilege.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Access logs, smart contract permission configurations, audit reports.

checklist_items.title: Conduct security audits and formal verification of governance proposal and vote mechanisms
checklist_items.description: Ensure the logic for proposal creation, voting, and tallying enforces the correct thresholds and prevents exploitation of the $BGT token balance check during governance actions.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: There is a vulnerability in the Governance Contracts (212) related to determining voting power or proposal creation requirements.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Rigorous security audits of Governance Contracts, formal verification of vote counting and power calculation logic, use of secure and well-tested snapshot mechanisms.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit reports, formal verification attestations.

checklist_items.title: Educate users to verify transaction details thoroughly in trusted wallets before signing
checklist_items.description: Encourage all participants to carefully review all transaction parameters, especially when interacting with dApps or smart contracts, to prevent tampering or manipulation.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: User does not meticulously verify all transaction details before signing a swap transaction on BEX.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Use hardware wallets, carefully review transaction details in wallet's trusted display.
checklist_items.evidence_required: User acknowledgment logs, wallet transaction screens.

checklist_items.title: Enforce HTTPS and verify RPC endpoint authenticity in wallet configurations
checklist_items.description: Ensure participants are configured to only connect to trusted, verified RPC endpoints with secure communication channels to prevent MitM and impersonation attacks.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: User connects to an RPC endpoint operated by an entity that logs and potentially misuses user metadata.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Enforce HTTPS for all RPC communications. Wallets should verify endpoint authenticity and warn users about untrusted endpoints.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Wallet configuration snapshots, wallet logs.

checklist_items.title: Enforce cryptographic authentication for forum RFRV submissions
checklist_items.description: Implement digital signatures or wallet-based login to verify the identity of users submitting RFRVs, ensuring alignment with assumptions about user verification.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Governance Forum lacks strong authentication mechanisms to verify the identity of the user submitting the RFRV.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement strong authentication (e.g., linking forum account to on-chain identity, SSO)
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit logs showing verified user identities for RFRV submissions.

checklist_items.title: Require on-chain proof of RFRV submission for non-repudiation
checklist_items.description: Design the RFRV submission process to produce on-chain events or attestations that serve as proof of submission, ensuring traceability and mitigate repudiation risks.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The process for recording and finalizing review decisions by the BGT Foundation does not create a tamper-proof, attributable record.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Maintain secure, immutable, and attributable audit trails of all RFRV review activities and final decisions.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Blockchain transaction logs confirming RFRV submission and review process.

checklist_items.title: Implement strict whitelisting and validation for Reward Vault addresses
checklist_items.description: Ensure that all emission directives from validators are validated against a maintained whitelist of approved Reward Vaults before execution to prevent directional misallocation.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Reward Vault smart contracts lack sufficient validation to verify target whitelisted status before accepting emissions.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Reinforce on-chain verification of Reward Vault whitelist status during emission transactions.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit trails or transaction logs showing emission directives checked against whitelist.

checklist_items.title: Use multi-signature and timelock controls for critical governance actions
checklist_items.description: Require multiple guardians' signatures and enforce timelocks for proposal cancellations to mitigate risks of privilege escalation and unauthorized manipulation.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Timelock Contract might incorrectly validate a cancellation signal if enough Guardian keys are compromised.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement multi-party approval with threshold signatures and enforce timelock mechanisms for proposal cancellations.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Transaction logs demonstrating multisig approval and timelock enforcement.

checklist_items.title: Conduct formal verification and security audits of reward distribution smart contracts
checklist_items.description: Apply formal verification, code audits, and establish bug bounty programs for Reward Vaults and incentive distribution contracts to prevent vulnerabilities and exploits.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Reward Vault contracts contain exploitable flaws which could lead to theft or disruption.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Rigorous security audits, formal methods, and bug bounty programs.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit reports and verification certificates.

checklist_items.title: Secure private keys of validators with hardware wallets and multi-signature schemes
checklist_items.description: Implement hardware security modules (HSMs), multi-party signing, and operational security best practices to prevent validator key compromise, enabling secure signing of emission and delegation transactions.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Validator's private keys can be compromised or misused, leading to malicious deposits or emissions.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Secure key management with hardware wallets, multi-party controls, and operational security protocols.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Key management process documentation and key access logs.

checklist_items.title: Implement ecosystem-wide consensus on protocol upgrades and administrative controls
checklist_items.description: Establish multi-party governance, multi-signature governance, and review mechanisms for administrative actions to prevent unauthorized privilege escalation or malicious contract deployment.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Administrative controls are weak, or keys can be compromised allowing privilege escalation.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Decentralized governance processes, multisig controls, regular security audits, timelock usage.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Governance policy documents, signed proposals, and audit logs.

checklist_items.title: Implement strong authentication for RFRV proposal submissions
checklist_items.description: Ensure that only verified on-chain identities or authenticated identities can submit RFRVs to prevent impersonation.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Governance Forum lacks strong authentication mechanisms to verify the identity of the user submitting the RFRV.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement strong authentication (e.g., linking forum account to on-chain identity, SSO)
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit logs showing verification of user identities in the forum.

checklist_items.title: Configure off-chain systems to generate cryptographically signed proposals and review decisions
checklist_items.description: Require cryptographic signatures from the BGT Foundation for all review decisions to prevent spoofing and repudiation.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The process for recording and finalizing review decisions by the BGT Foundation does not create a tamper-proof, attributable record of who made the decision and when.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Require cryptographic signatures from the BGT Foundation for all review decisions.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Signed review decision logs or blockchain signatures.

checklist_items.title: Implement multi-factor authentication (MFA) for BGT Foundation members' accounts
checklist_items.description: Enhance security around account access to prevent unauthorized privilege escalation or malicious modifications of review decisions.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Weak access controls, vulnerabilities in systems used by the BGT Foundation, or compromised credentials could allow an unauthorized individual to gain the privileges of a BGT Foundation reviewer.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement MFA, regular access audits, and secure account management.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit logs showing MFA enforcement and access controls.

checklist_items.title: Secure private key management for Validator nodes
checklist_items.description: Employ hardware security modules (HSMs), multisignature schemes, and operational security best practices to prevent key compromise that can lead to spoofing or malicious block proposal.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Validator's block signing key can be compromised.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Use hardware wallets, secure key storage, and multi-signature controls for validator keys.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit logs demonstrating secure key storage practices.

checklist_items.title: Conduct regular security audits and formal verification of reward distribution contracts
checklist_items.description: Ensure the smart contracts responsible for reward distribution (e.g., $BGT emissions, Incentive Vaults) are free from critical vulnerabilities that could be exploited for privilege escalation or tampering.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Reward Vault contracts may contain exploitable flaws.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Audits by reputable security firms, formal verification, and bug bounty programs.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit reports, formal verification results, and bug bounty reports.

checklist_items.title: Implement on-chain whitelist verification for Reward Vaults and Incentive Handlers
checklist_items.description: Verify that any Reward Vault or incentive distribution contract is verified and whitelisted before acceptance to prevent directing $BGT emissions to malicious or unverified contracts.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Validator can direct emissions to non-whitelisted or faulty vaults.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Require on-chain whitelist verification before emission transfer.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Blockchain transaction logs showing whitelist checks.

checklist_items.title: Establish secure communication channels and operational security protocols for BGT Foundation members
checklist_items.description: Prevent leaking of sensitive review decisions or internal discussions by utilizing encrypted communication and operational security best practices.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Guardians' off-chain coordination may be insecure or leaked.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Use secure messaging platforms, enforce NDAs, and operational security reviews.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Security policy documentation, communication logs.

checklist_items.title: Implement comprehensive DoS mitigation measures for critical smart contracts and infrastructure
checklist_items.description: Deploy rate limiting, circuit breakers, and infrastructure redundancy to prevent operational halts of reward claiming, voting, or proposal functions.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Vulnerabilities or overload can prevent reward claims or governance actions.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement rate limiting, high-availability infrastructure, and circuit breakers.
checklist_items.evidence_required: System capacity tests, incident reports.

checklist_items.title: Verify strong authentication mechanisms for RFRV submission portals to ensure submissions are attributable to verified identities.
checklist_items.description: Ensure that the Governance Forum or associated systems require users to authenticate via cryptographic signatures or on-chain identities before submitting RFRV proposals.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Governance Forum lacks strong authentication mechanisms to verify the identity of the user submitting the RFRV.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement strong authentication (e.g., linking forum account to on-chain identity, SSO)
checklist_items.evidence_required: Screenshot or audit log showing linked on-chain identity at login.

checklist_items.title: Implement end-to-end integrity checks for governance proposals to prevent tampering before execution.
checklist_items.description: Use cryptographic signatures and on-chain validation to ensure that proposals submitted to governance contracts have not been altered during transmission or storage.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: A malicious actor can alter proposal content before submission or while in transit.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Use cryptographically signed proposals and on-chain verification mechanisms.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Signed proposal data, verification logs.

checklist_items.title: Require multi-signature approval for sensitive governance actions to prevent unilateral malicious proposals.
checklist_items.description: Implement multi-party approval protocols within governance smart contracts so that no single actor can unilaterally execute harmful proposals.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The current governance process relies on single signatures or insufficient multi-party checks.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Enforce multi-signature approvals for proposal execution.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Configuration audit of governance contract permissions.

checklist_items.title: Verify whitelisted status of Reward Vaults before directing emissions or rewards to prevent misallocation.
checklist_items.description: Include on-chain checks within rewards distribution contracts to ensure only approved Reward Vault addresses receive incentives or emissions.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Validator can direct emissions to non-whitelisted or faulty vaults.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement on-chain whitelist validation for Reward Vault addresses before emissions are transferred.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Transaction logs showing whitelist verification steps.

checklist_items.title: Ensure secure private key management and multi-factor authentication for validators and key custodians to prevent elevation of privilege during emission signing.
checklist_items.description: Adopt hardware security modules, hardware wallets, and multi-factor authorization for any operational signing keys used by validators or emission directs.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The validator's private keys used for signing emissions can be compromised.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Secure key management with hardware wallets and operational procedures.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Key management audit logs and hardware wallet configuration reports.

checklist_items.title: Implement rigorous input validation and transaction verification in wallet interfaces and dApps to prevent tampering before signing.
checklist_items.description: Design wallet and dApp interfaces to display all transaction parameters explicitly for user review, and use hardware wallets to sign only vetted data.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: User or attacker can modify transaction data before signing.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Use hardware wallets and explicit transaction review procedures.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit logs of transaction data presented to users.

checklist_items.title: Establish secure communication channels and verify TLS/SSL configurations for RPC endpoints and off-chain services to prevent MitM and data tampering.
checklist_items.description: Ensure all RPC and off-chain communication uses TLS with strict certificate validation and implement network security best practices.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: RPC traffic can be intercepted or altered if not properly secured.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Enforce HTTPS, certificate pinning, and validated RPC endpoints.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Configuration audits of RPC services, network security scans.

checklist_items.title: Deploy phishing-resistant UI/UX practices and educate users to verify contract addresses and URLs before transactions.
checklist_items.description: Provide clear, prominent display of contract addresses, use verified links, and educate users on security best practices for interacting with dApps.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Users may be deceived by fake interfaces or URLs.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Use verified links, user education, UI indicators for authenticity.
checklist_items.evidence_required: User feedback sessions, UI/UX audit reports.

checklist_items.title: Implement strong authentication for RFRV submissions, linked to verified on-chain identities.
checklist_items.description: Check if the governance platform requires users submitting RFRVs to authenticate via wallet-based signatures that are verifiable on-chain.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Governance Forum does not have strong authentication mechanisms to verify the identity of the user submitting the RFRV.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Require wallet-based login with cryptographic verification tied to on-chain identity.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit logs showing linked wallet identity at submission time.

checklist_items.title: Enforce on-chain validation of Reward Vault whitelist status before processing emissions.
checklist_items.description: Verify that the Reward Vault smart contracts include on-chain checks to confirm they are whitelisted and active prior to accepting $BGT emission transfers.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The system does not currently verify vault whitelist status before emission transactions.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement on-chain whitelist validation in emission distribution logic.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Smart contract audit reports and transaction scripts demonstrating whitelist verification.

checklist_items.title: Require multi-party approval or multisignature control for administrative functions in Reward Vaults.
checklist_items.description: Check if all administrative functions on Reward Vault smart contracts are protected by multisignature wallets or require multiple signatures, reducing risk of privilege escalation.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Reward Vault contract's administrative controls may have insufficient access restrictions.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Restrict admin functions to multisig wallets with multi-party approval and enforce role-based access.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit reports confirming multi-signature enforcement for admin functions.

checklist_items.title: Secure private key management for Validator nodes and signing keys.
checklist_items.description: Verify that Validator keys used for proposing blocks, signing emissions, and other privileged operations are stored in hardware security modules (HSMs) or equivalent secure environments.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Validator private keys are stored insecurely, risking compromise.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Use hardware security modules and enforce operational security procedures for key storage.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Key management audit logs, HSM hardware attestations, operational procedures document.

checklist_items.title: Implement transaction signing with hardware wallets and verify transaction parameters before submission.
checklist_items.description: Before signing critical transactions (e.g., stake, propose blocks, vote), ensure the user reviews and confirms transaction details, especially amounts, recipient addresses, and operation parameters.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Users do not currently verify transaction details before signing, leading to risks of tampering.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Require users to verify transaction details explicitly in their hardware wallets before signing.
checklist_items.evidence_required: User confirmation records, hardware wallet logs.

checklist_items.title: Configure RPC endpoints to use HTTPS and verify endpoint authenticity regularly.
checklist_items.description: Check that RPC endpoints used by users and validators utilize secure, HTTPS connections with valid certificates, and that endpoint URLs are verified against official sources.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: RPC endpoints are not secured with HTTPS or their authenticity is not verified, risking MitM and data tampering.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Enforce HTTPS, promote use of official RPC URLs, and implement domain verification.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Network configuration audits, wallet configuration screenshots.

checklist_items.title: Adopt anti-phishing measures including user education and official domain verification.
checklist_items.description: Ensure users are aware of official links and verify domain authenticity before interacting with dApps or signing transactions.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Users may be tricked by phishing sites and do not verify URLs or contract addresses.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Display official domain info prominently, educate users on verifying URLs.
checklist_items.evidence_required: User training records, phishing awareness materials.

checklist_items.title: Deploy web application with strict Content Security Policy (CSP), Subresource Integrity (SRI), and HTTPS.
checklist_items.description: Secure the dApp frontend code, enforce strong security headers, and ensure all assets are loaded securely to prevent interface tampering.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Malicious interface modifications can lead to transaction tampering and fund loss.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement CSP, SRI, HTTPS, and regular security audits of the web frontend.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Security scan reports, headers screenshots.

checklist_items.title: Verify strong authentication mechanisms are in place for forum users submitting RFRVs
checklist_items.description: Check if the Governance Forum requires users to authenticate via verified on-chain identities or multi-factor methods before submitting RFRVs, as a defense against impersonation.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Governance Forum (223) does not have robust mechanisms to verify the true identity of RFRV submitters.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement strong authentication (e.g., digital signatures, verified on-chain identities, SSO)
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit logs showing authenticated user identities at submission time.

checklist_items.title: Implement cryptographic signatures to attribute RFRV submissions to legitimate protocols
checklist_items.description: Require RFRV submissions to be accompanied by digital signatures from known protocol keys to prevent spoofing and repudiation.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The RFRV submission mechanism lacks strong attribution methods, making repudiation or impersonation feasible.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Require and verify cryptographic signatures for all RFRV submissions.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Signed messages with corresponding signature verification logs.

checklist_items.title: Ensure that the validator key used for $BGT emissions is stored securely and multi-signed
checklist_items.description: Audit the private key infrastructure for validators to prevent compromise of emission signing keys, and consider multi-signature protocols for emission directives.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Validator's private key used for signing emission directives can be compromised.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Use hardware security modules (HSMs), multi-signature schemes, and secure key management practices for emission signing keys.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Key management audit reports, HSM logs, multi-signature approval records.

checklist_items.title: Verify whitelist of Reward Vaults prior to directing $BGT emissions
checklist_items.description: Implement on-chain checks to ensure emissions are only sent to Reward Vaults that are explicitly whitelisted and active.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Validator can direct emissions to non-whitelisted Reward Vaults.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Smart contract enforces whitelist checks before processing emissions.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Smart contract code audits, on-chain event logs showing whitelist enforcement.

checklist_items.title: Implement robust input validation for all user-initiated transactions in dApps
checklist_items.description: Ensure that all transaction parameters (e.g., staking amounts, swap details, redemption details) are explicitly verified by the user and with on-chain checks before signing and submission.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Users do not verify all transaction details before signing, leading to tampering.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Design dApps to display and confirm all transaction details explicitly, and encourage user diligence.
checklist_items.evidence_required: UI/UX review reports, user testing logs.

checklist_items.title: Use hardware wallets and session validations to prevent transaction tampering in wallet interactions
checklist_items.description: Encourage users to utilize hardware wallets that display transaction details securely and verify all parameters before signing to prevent client-side tampering.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: User devices and wallets may be compromised or manipulated.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: User guidelines for hardware wallet use, wallet interface design to display clear transaction info.
checklist_items.evidence_required: User training completion records, wallet UI evaluation reports.

checklist_items.title: Configure RPC endpoints to enforce HTTPS and prevent MitM attacks
checklist_items.description: Ensure all RPC endpoints used by users are secured with HTTPS, and encourage users to connect only to trusted, verified RPC providers to mitigate communication tampering.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: RPC communication is vulnerable to MitM and unsecured endpoints.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Enforce HTTPS protocols, implement endpoint validation and user warnings.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Network security configurations, user connection logs.

checklist_items.title: Implement domain verification and official URL dissemination for dApps
checklist_items.description: Publish and promote official URLs for all user-facing dApps (e.g., BeraHub, Honey Factory), and educate users to verify URLs before interacting.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Users cannot reliably distinguish fakes without verification.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Official documentation, user education campaigns, browser warnings.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Communication plans, usability testing reports.

checklist_items.title: Maintain immutable audit logs for all governance proposals and reviews
checklist_items.description: Ensure that all proposals, reviews, and decisions within governance are recorded on-chain or in tamper-evident logs to prevent repudiation and facilitate audits.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Decisions and reviews are not currently tracked in an immutable manner, risking denial of actions.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement on-chain event logging, digital signatures, or multi-party signing mechanisms.
checklist_items.evidence_required: On-chain event data, audit trail records.

checklist_items.title: Implement strong authentication linking forum accounts to on-chain identities
checklist_items.description: Verify that the Governance Forum requires users to authenticate via their blockchain wallet, ensuring identities are verifiable and mitigating spoofing attacks.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Governance Forum lacks strong authentication mechanisms to verify the identity of the user submitting the RFRV.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement strong authentication (e.g., linking forum account to on-chain identity, SSO)
checklist_items.evidence_required: Screenshot or audit log showing linked on-chain identity at login.

checklist_items.title: Enforce on-chain verification of RFRV submissions and reviewer identities
checklist_items.description: Ensure that the process for submitting RFRV proposals and reviews incorporates on-chain signatures or cryptographically verifiable evidence to prevent spoofing and tampering.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Governance Forum does not have robust mechanisms to verify the true identity of RFRV submitters.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement cryptographically signed proposals and reviews linked to verified on-chain identities.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Signed messages with blockchain signatures linked to known identities.

checklist_items.title: Secure communication channels for Guardians' internal discussions to prevent pre-disclosure of cancellation intentions
checklist_items.description: Establish secure, confidential communication protocols (e.g., encrypted messaging) among Guardians to mitigate risks of premature disclosure of proposal cancellation plans.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Guardians coordinate or discuss potential cancellations off-chain before executing the multisig transaction.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Establish secure and confidential communication channels for Guardian coordination.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit logs demonstrating encrypted communication protocols among Guardians.

checklist_items.title: Implement multisig and role-based access control with formal verification for Timelock and Guardian contracts
checklist_items.description: Ensure that the multisig verification logic for proposal cancellation requires at least the threshold (e.g., 5 of 9 signatures) and has been formally verified to prevent privilege escalation exploits.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: A vulnerability in the Timelock Contract's multisig validation logic could allow a smaller subset of Guardians to bypass the quorum requirement.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Use well-audited, formal verification of multisig validation logic; enforce threshold signature checks.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Formal verification reports; multisig transaction logs showing signature requirements.

checklist_items.title: Secure and audit reward distribution logic within Reward Vaults to prevent reward exploitation
checklist_items.description: Conduct security audits and formal verification of Reward Vaults' incentive distribution and reward calculation mechanisms to prevent reward theft or inflation.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Reward Vault contracts, which may be developed by third-party protocols, could contain vulnerabilities in their incentive mechanisms.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement rigorous security audits, formal verification, use standard libraries, and continuous monitoring.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit reports; on-chain logs of reward payouts and distributions.

checklist_items.title: Validate Reward Vault addresses against official whitelists before emission and reward distribution
checklist_items.description: Implement on-chain checks ensuring that all Reward Vaults receiving emissions are verified against a secure, trusted whitelist to prevent directing incentives to malicious or unverified vaults.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Validator can maliciously or accidentally direct emissions to non-whitelisted or faulty vaults.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: On-chain verification of vault whitelists; enforce whitelist checks in emission dispatch functions.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Transaction logs showing emission transactions with whitelist verification, audit trail of whitelist management.

checklist_items.title: Use secure, verified RPC endpoints to prevent Man-in-the-Middle attacks during wallet connection
checklist_items.description: Ensure users connect to trusted RPC URLs with HTTPS and verify endpoint authenticity to prevent spoofing or MitM attacks that could lead to phishing or data interception.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: User connects to an RPC endpoint operated by an entity that logs and potentially misuses user metadata.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Use official RPC URLs, verify SSL/TLS certificates, Wallet warnings for suspicious links.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Screenshots, audit logs demonstrating verified RPC endpoint connections.

checklist_items.title: Configure and enforce transaction review and confirmation in wallets to prevent tampering
checklist_items.description: Encourage users to carefully verify transaction details (recipient, amount, parameters) before signing, and utilize hardware wallets or trusted tools to detect tampering attempts.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: User, through a compromised wallet or UI, might be tricked to sign altered transactions.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Use secure hardware wallets; verify transaction details before signing; implement wallet UI warnings.
checklist_items.evidence_required: User training records; wallet logs showing transaction verification steps.

checklist_items.title: Implement multi-layered validation for on-chain proposals and votes to prevent unauthorized or malicious finalization
checklist_items.description: Design governance contracts to require multi-party signatures, threshold approvals, and formal verification to ensure only legitimate proposals are executed and votes are valid.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: A flaw in the Governance Contracts might allow proposal creation or votes without meeting protocol requirements.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Use verified, multi-party approval mechanisms; formal verification of governance logic.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit reports; on-chain proposal and vote logs showing approval processes.

checklist_items.title: Implement strong authentication mechanisms for RFRV submissions to prevent impersonation.
checklist_items.description: Check if the system requires users submitting RFRVs to authenticate via wallet-based or on-chain identity verification, as the current assumption indicates a lack of such mechanisms.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Governance Forum lacks strong authentication mechanisms to verify the identity of the user submitting the RFRV.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement strong authentication (e.g., linking forum account to on-chain identity, SSO)
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit logs showing linked on-chain identities for forum submissions.

checklist_items.title: Ensure blockchain transactions related to proposals and votes are immutably recorded with proper cryptographic signatures.
checklist_items.description: Verify that all governance proposals and votes are stored as on-chain transactions with cryptographic signatures to prevent repudiation or alteration.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The process for recording and finalizing review decisions does not create a tamper-proof, attributable record.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Maintain secure, immutable, and attributable audit trails of all RFRV review activities and final decisions.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit logs of on-chain proposals and votes with signatures.

checklist_items.title: Verify that all Reward Vault contracts are deployed with verified source code and have undergone security audits.
checklist_items.description: Check if the Reward Vault smart contracts, especially those associated with whitelisted protocols, are audited and verified to prevent vulnerabilities that could be exploited for tampering or theft.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Reward Vault contract deployed by a Protocol may contain software vulnerabilities.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Conduct thorough security audits of the vesting contract, focusing on DoS vectors.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit reports and verified source code signatures.

checklist_items.title: Implement on-chain whitelist and access control checks before allowing $BGT emissions or incentive distributions.
checklist_items.description: Verify that the smart contracts responsible for distributing $BGT perform on-chain validation to ensure emissions are only directed to whitelisted and active Reward Vaults.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Validator can direct emissions to non-functional or non-whitelisted vaults.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Strict on-chain verification that target Reward Vaults are whitelisted and active before emissions are processed.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Transaction logs showing emissions directed only to whitelisted vaults with on-chain validation.

checklist_items.title: Ensure the private keys of system administrators and Validator nodes are secured with multi-signature and hardware wallet solutions.
checklist_items.description: Check if the private keys used for administrative and validator operations are protected by multi-signature schemes and hardware security modules (HSMs) to prevent elevation of privilege through key compromise.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The private key(s) controlling administrative functions or validator keys could be compromised.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Secure validator key management (e.g., HSMs, robust operational security).
checklist_items.evidence_required: Key management policy documents, hardware wallet deployment records.

checklist_items.title: Use secure, verified RPC endpoints for all blockchain interactions to prevent connection to malicious nodes.
checklist_items.description: Check whether users and system components connect only through verified, HTTPS-encrypted RPC endpoints to mitigate spoofing and MitM attacks.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The User's RPC endpoint might be malicious or unverified, leading to data tampering or eavesdropping.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Enforce HTTPS for all RPC communications and utilize trusted, verified RPC providers.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Configuration records of RPC endpoints with validation signatures.

checklist_items.title: Educate users to verify contract addresses and use official interfaces for token minting, redemptions, and asset swaps.
checklist_items.description: Implement user education program emphasizing verification of contract addresses and legitimate URLs before signing transactions to prevent spoofing and tampering.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Users may be tricked by phishing sites or malicious interfaces.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: User education on verifying contract addresses, official links, and signatures.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Training completion records, reports of user verification tests.

checklist_items.title: Require signatures from multiple independent validators or multi-signature schemes for critical governance actions such as proposal passing or proposal cancellations.
