checklist_items.description: Verify that governance proposals and cancellation actions are validated by multi-signature approval or threshold signatures from multiple guardians before execution.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Compromise of Guardian keys could lead to unauthorized proposal cancellations.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement multisig validation for proposal cancellations with threshold signatures.
checklist_items.evidence_required: On-chain multisig approval signatures, multi-party confirmation logs.

checklist_items.title: Monitor for anomalous activity and high transaction volume in governance proposals and voting to detect potential spam or DoS attacks.
checklist_items.description: Verify whether the governance system implements threshold-based or rate-limited proposal submissions to prevent excessive spam, thereby maintaining governance integrity.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Malicious actors can flood the governance system with proposals.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Adjust proposal creation thresholds, implement rate limiting and filtering algorithms.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Proposal submission logs showing volume and frequency of proposals against thresholds.

checklist_items.title: Implement on-chain validation checks for all asset transfer and staking transactions to prevent off-chain tampering.
checklist_items.description: Verify that all transfer, staking, and redemption transactions are validated on-chain with robust input validation and signature checks, reducing risks from client or wallet tampering.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Client-side transaction parameters could be tampered before signing due to compromised wallets or malicious frontends.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Design transaction flows with smart contract validation, multi-factor transaction confirmation, and UI verification.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Transaction logs, validation function audit reports.

checklist_items.title: Ensure governance proposal creation is restricted to verified DAO members with cryptographic attestation
checklist_items.description: Verify that proposals are submitted only by DAO members whose identities are confirmed through cryptographic signatures to prevent impersonation.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Governance Contracts (212) correctly process signed proposal creation transactions.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement strong signature verification and enforce multi-sig approval mechanisms.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Logs of signed proposal transactions with cryptographic attestations.

checklist_items.title: Mandate rigorous security audits and formal verification for Reward Vault and bridge smart contracts
checklist_items.description: Perform comprehensive audits and formal verification of all Reward Vault (209) and bridge (210) smart contracts before deployment to mitigate vulnerabilities that could lead to tampering or exploits.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Reward Vault contracts could contain vulnerabilities in their implementation.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Establish formal security audits and leverage verified libraries.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit reports and formal verification proofs.

checklist_items.title: Implement multi-factor authentication and strict access controls for validator and admin keys
checklist_items.description: Ensure that all validator and admin keys controlling reward emissions, signing emission directives, or administrative functions are secured using multi-factor authentication, hardware security modules, and role-based permissions to prevent elevation of privilege and unauthorized control.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Validator's keys or admin controls could be compromised, allowing malicious directives.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Enforce hardware wallet usage, multi-signature approvals, and role-based access restrictions.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Access logs, hardware wallet management audits.

checklist_items.title: Require off-chain authorization signatures for proposal and transaction modifications
checklist_items.description: To prevent tampering with proposal contents, enforce that all modifications to governance proposals or sensitive transactions require signatures from authorized personnel or multisig approval, ensuring integrity of the data before on-chain submission.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The proposal creation or modification process does not have sufficient safeguards against tampering.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement signed approval workflows with multi-party attestations or multisig confirmation.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Signed approval records and audit logs.

checklist_items.title: Set up monitoring and alerts for unusual emission directing activity from validators
checklist_items.description: Implement on-chain and off-chain monitoring to detect abnormal or unexpected patterns in $BGT emission directives, enabling prompt response to potential token diversion or malicious control.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Validator's emission directives could be manipulated or forged.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Deploy monitoring tools that track emission transactions and flag anomalies.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Alert logs, transaction pattern reports.

checklist_items.title: Secure RPC endpoints with transport layer security and authenticated access
checklist_items.description: Configure all remote procedure call (RPC) endpoints used for interacting with Berachain to enforce HTTPS with valid TLS certificates, and restrict access with IP whitelisting or VPN-only access to prevent MitM and spoofing attacks.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: RPC endpoints operate without strict security protocols, risking MitM or data tampering.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement end-to-end TLS, verify certificates, and restrict access to trusted networks.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Network configuration audits and TLS certificate validation reports.

checklist_items.title: Enforce domain and contract address verification for user interactions
checklist_items.description: Implement user interface validation checks that prevent interaction with unverified or suspicious contract addresses, including verifying domain authenticity, contract deployment source, and using whitelisted addresses.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Users may interact with unverified or malicious contract addresses during swaps or staking.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Use official links, domain verification, and verify on-chain contract addresses before transaction signing.
checklist_items.evidence_required: UI code reviews and verified address lists.

checklist_items.title: Force transaction verification by wallets with user-visible parameters
checklist_items.description: Design wallet integrations and user interfaces to display all critical transaction details explicitly, requiring users to verify and confirm each before signing, reducing tampering risks.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The transaction details before signing are not being adequately verified by users.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement UI prompts, transaction detail displays, and hardware wallet confirmations.
checklist_items.evidence_required: User confirmation logs, UI design documentation.

checklist_items.title: Implement strong authentication for RFRV submissions to verify submitters' identities
checklist_items.description: Ensure that the system requires wallet-based or cryptographic verification for users submitting RFRVs, reducing spoofing risks.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Governance Forum lacks strong authentication mechanisms to verify the identity of the user submitting the RFRV.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement strong authentication (e.g., linking RFRV submission to wallet signatures or verified identities)
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit logs showing linked identity verification during RFRV submission.

checklist_items.title: Require multisignature or threshold-based approval for proposal cancellations to prevent privilege escalation
checklist_items.description: Implement a robust multisig or multi-party approval process for cancelling proposals, ensuring no single guardian can unilaterally perform high-privilege actions.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Timelock Contract's cancel function can be exploited if less than 5 guardians approve, undermining the multisig requirement.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Enforce strict multisignature verification with audits and time-lock controls for proposal cancellations.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Multisig transaction logs showing approval threshold met for cancellations.

checklist_items.title: Ensure all Reward Vault contracts undergo security audits before deployment and whitelisting
checklist_items.description: Mandate comprehensive security audits for Reward Vault smart contracts, focusing on access control and reentrancy vulnerabilities, prior to whitelisting and incentive distribution.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Reward Vault contracts may contain flaws that can be exploited to drain funds or cause DoS.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Require formal audits and secure development practices for Reward Vault contracts before whitelisting.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit reports and deployment records showing approved security reviews.

checklist_items.title: Implement on-chain verification for reward distribution parameters and thresholds
checklist_items.description: Design Reward Vault and distribution contracts to verify the validity of parameters (e.g., thresholds, addresses) on-chain, reducing tampering by malicious signers or compromised environments.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Reward distribution parameters may be altered client-side before signing, leading to manipulation.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Use on-chain checks and strict validation of parameters in smart contracts.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Smart contract code with built-in validation logic; audit reports.

checklist_items.title: Enforce secure private key management for system operators and guardians
checklist_items.description: Adopt hardware security modules, multi-factor authentication, and operational security best practices for guardians and validators to prevent privilege escalation and impersonation.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Compromise of guardian/private keys enables spoofing and privilege escalation in multisig and admin functions.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Use hardware wallets, multisignature schemes, and strict operational controls for key management.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Access logs; hardware key deployment records; operational procedures.

checklist_items.title: Verify that all smart contracts have Role-Based Access Control with time-locks and multi-signature safeguards
checklist_items.description: Implement and audit role-based access controls, with multi-signature and timelock enforced operations, for critical smart contract functions like parameter changes or asset transfers.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Weak access controls enable unauthorized administrative operations or privilege escalation.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Use proven access control frameworks, enforce multi-sig and timelock controls, and audit access control logic.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Access control setup documentation; multisig approval logs; smart contract code audits.

checklist_items.title: Deploy and verify use of official verified contract addresses for all critical components
checklist_items.description: Ensure that system components like Reward Vaults, Honey Factory, and the Berachain bridge are deployed at verified, published addresses and that users are guided to interact only with these addresses.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Users may interact with malicious copies if contract addresses are not verified.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Publish and disseminate official contract addresses; educate users to verify addresses before interaction.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Official address registry; user guides; transaction logs showing interactions with verified addresses.

checklist_items.title: Implement certificate or signature-based authentication for off-chain communications and governance reviews
checklist_items.description: Use cryptographic signatures or certificates to verify the authenticity of documents, proposals, or review decisions made by the BGT Foundation and governance entities.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Review decisions could be spoofed if message origin isn't verified.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Require signatures from official keys or certificates for all governance communications.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Signed messages, verification logs, audit trails.

checklist_items.title: Establish operational procedures for rapid response and contingency plans for governance process disruptions
checklist_items.description: Develop and document procedures to handle incidents such as Guardian key compromise, system outages, or malicious proposal attacks, to prevent governance stagnation.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Governance process may be disrupted by Guardian or system failures.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Define incident response plans, escalation procedures, and alternative decision pathways.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Operational plans; incident logs; training records.

checklist_items.title: Apply formal verification and comprehensive testing to all critical smart contracts, especially those handling asset transfers and admin functions
checklist_items.description: Use formal methods, such as model checking and extensive test vectors, to verify that smart contracts enforce access controls, prevent overflows, and do not contain reentrancy or other vulnerabilities.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Smart contracts may contain exploitable bugs if not rigorously verified.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement formal verification and rigorous testing procedures before deployment.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Verification reports, test case results, audit documentation.

checklist_items.title: Implement strong user verification for RFRV submissions
checklist_items.description: Ensure that the governance review process requires submitters to authenticate via verified on-chain identities to prevent impersonation or spoofing.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Governance Forum lacks strong authentication mechanisms to verify the identity of the user submitting the RFRV.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Use digital signatures verified on-chain to authenticate submitters.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit logs demonstrating verified on-chain identities linked to forum submissions.

checklist_items.title: Ensure only whitelisted Reward Vaults are eligible for $BGT emissions
checklist_items.description: Implement on-chain checks that verify Reward Vaults are whitelisted and active before directing emissions, to prevent funds from being sent to malicious or non-compliant vaults.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Validator can direct $BGT emissions to any Reward Vault, including unwhitelisted or faulty ones.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Enforce cryptographic verification that Reward Vaults are whitelisted before emission transactions.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit logs and transaction traces showing verification steps for Reward Vault whitelist status.

checklist_items.title: Secure the private keys of Validator accounts used for $BGT emission signing
checklist_items.description: Mandate multi-factor authentication and hardware security modules for private keys controlling emission directives, to prevent unauthorized spoofing of $BGT emission transactions.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Validator private keys are used to sign emission direction transactions and can be compromised.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Store private keys in hardware security modules with multi-signature requirements for critical operations.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Key management audit logs, hardware security module access logs.

checklist_items.title: Establish secure communication channels for Guardian multisig operations
checklist_items.description: Use encrypted, multi-party secure channels for guardians to coordinate proposal cancellations, reducing the risk of MITM tampering or data leaks.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Guardian signatures are aggregated off-chain and could be tampered with if communication channels are insecure.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement VPNs, TLS, and multisig protocols for guardian coordination.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Communication logs showing encrypted channels and multisig signatures.

checklist_items.title: Implement comprehensive logging and on-chain record-keeping for governance proposals and votes
checklist_items.description: Ensure all proposal creation, modification, and voting actions are immutably recorded on-chain with proper attribution to prevent repudiation and facilitate auditability.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Governance actions may be denied or disputed due to lack of verifiable, immutable records.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Use of event logs and group signatures on-chain for all governance activities.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Blockchain transaction history and event logs demonstrating on-chain record of proposals and votes.

checklist_items.title: Enforce secure private key management and operational security for wallet-based critical operations
checklist_items.description: Use hardware wallets, multi-sig approvals, and strict operational procedures for all private key activities related to asset and vote management.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Private keys used for sensitive operations can be stolen or compromised.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Operational security policies, hardware wallets, multi-sig requirements.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Operational security audit reports and hardware wallet issuance logs.

checklist_items.title: Configure smart contracts with role-based access control and timelocks for administrative functions
checklist_items.description: Implement fine-grained access control with multi-signature verification and timelocks on critical admin functions to prevent privilege escalation or unauthorized modifications.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Reward Vaults contain admin functions that could be exploited if improperly secured.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Role-based access control with multi-sig and timelocks for admin actions.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Smart contract code and deployment audit reports showing access control mechanisms.

checklist_items.title: Deploy only verified, audited reward vault contracts
checklist_items.description: Mandate thorough security audits and formal verification for all Reward Vault contracts before deployment and whitelisting to prevent vulnerabilities and malicious logic.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Reward Vault contracts handle assets and incentives, and vulnerabilities could lead to loss.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Mandatory security audits, formal verification, and bug bounty programs for Reward Vault deployments.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit reports, verification certificates, and deployment records.

checklist_items.title: Verify contract addresses and implement user education to prevent phishing and spoofing
checklist_items.description: Users must be educated to always verify contract addresses before interaction. Official links and signatures should be used to prevent spoofing and impersonation attacks.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Users may interact with malicious or spoofed interfaces leading to fund loss.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Educational campaigns, official brand channels, and wallet warnings.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Screenshots of verified contract addresses and user feedback documentation.

checklist_items.title: Implement strong authentication for RFRV submissions to verify submitter identity
checklist_items.description: Ensure that only verified on-chain identities can submit RFRV proposals to prevent impersonation and spoofing.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Governance Forum lacks strong authentication mechanisms to verify the identity of the user submitting the RFRV.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement strong authentication (e.g., linking forum account to on-chain identity, SSO)
checklist_items.evidence_required: Screenshot or audit log showing linked on-chain identity at login.

checklist_items.title: Verify whitelisted status of Reward Vaults before directing $BGT emissions
checklist_items.description: Ensure that the smart contracts processing $BGT emissions verify the vaults are whitelisted and active, preventing directing funds to malicious or unapproved vaults.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: A validator might maliciously or accidentally direct emissions to non-whitelisted or faulty vaults.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Strict on-chain verification that target Reward Vaults are whitelisted and active before emissions are processed.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit logs showing verification steps for Reward Vaults during emission transactions.

checklist_items.title: Secure private keys of validators with hardware wallets and multi-signature controls
checklist_items.description: Implement hardware security modules and multi-signature schemes for validator private keys to prevent unauthorized signing and spoofing of emission or delegation transactions.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Validator's private key can be compromised, leading to spoofed $BGT or $HONEY}
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Secure validator key management (e.g., HSMs, robust operational security). Optional: Implement a cooldown period or multi-signature requirement for changing emission directions.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Security audit logs of key management procedures and hardware wallet setup.

checklist_items.title: Perform comprehensive security audits and formal verification of reward distribution contracts
checklist_items.description: Ensure that Reward Vaults, including third-party developed ones, undergo rigorous audits and formal verification before deployment to prevent exploitation or reward misallocation.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Reward Vault contracts might contain vulnerabilities (e.g., reentrancy, overflow).
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Rigorous security audits for all Reward Vault contracts, including formal verification where feasible.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit reports and formal verification certificates.

checklist_items.title: Enforce strict access control and multi-factor authentication for admin functions of Reward Vaults
checklist_items.description: Implement role-based access control and multi-factor authentication to prevent privilege escalation or unauthorized administrative actions on Reward Vault contracts.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Weak access controls allow unauthorized privilege escalation.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement and audit robust access control mechanisms with MFA for administrative functions.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Access control policy documents, MFA logs.

checklist_items.title: Establish and enforce operational security protocols for BGT Foundation members
checklist_items.description: Require multi-party approvals, conduct regular security training, and monitor activities of Foundation members to prevent tampering or internal compromise.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Internal compromise of Foundation members can lead to unauthorized review or cancellation of proposals.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement multi-party approval, operational security practices, regular audits.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Approval logs, security audit reports.

checklist_items.title: Implement domain whitelisting and certificate pinning for Wallet connection interfaces
checklist_items.description: Ensure wallet dApp interfaces connect only to verified, trusted RPC endpoints and smart contract addresses to prevent spoofing and man-in-the-middle attacks.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: User can connect to malicious RPCs and fake contracts if not verified.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Enforce HTTPS, warn users, maintain verified list of RPCs and contract addresses.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Configuration files, wallet logs showing RPC endpoints.

checklist_items.title: Utilize hardware wallets and explicit transaction review for sensitive operations
checklist_items.description: Encourage users to use hardware wallets and review all transaction details carefully before signing, especially for critical actions like minting, redeeming, or delegating.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: User's private keys are not adequately secured, leading to risk of tampering.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Public awareness campaigns about hardware wallets and transaction review procedures.
checklist_items.evidence_required: User training materials, wallet setup documentation.

checklist_items.title: Deploy malware-resistant and tamper-proof front-end interfaces for all user interactions
checklist_items.description: Implement secure coding practices, content security policies, and code signing to prevent UI tampering and phishing attacks on all dApp frontends.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Users rely on insecure or unverified UI components that can be compromised.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Use secure development frameworks, Content Security Policy (CSP), code signing, regular vulnerability assessments.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Code review reports, CSP deployment records.

checklist_items.title: Set strict transaction verification and fingerprinting mechanisms to prevent tampering
checklist_items.description: Require users to confirm transaction details explicitly and use hardware wallets or trusted environments to reduce risks of tampering before signing complex transactions.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Users do not verify transaction details before signing, leading to risk of tampering.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Wallets with explicit verification prompts, user education, secure transaction signing practices.
checklist_items.evidence_required: User training documentation, wallet transaction logs.

checklist_items.title: Implement strong authentication linking forum submissions to on-chain identities
checklist_items.description: Verify that the Governance Forum requires and enforces linking user identities to verified on-chain accounts for RFRV submissions.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Governance Forum lacks strong authentication mechanisms to verify the identity of the user submitting the RFRV.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement strong authentication (e.g., linking forum account to on-chain identity, SSO)
checklist_items.evidence_required: Screenshot or audit log showing linked on-chain identity at login.

checklist_items.title: Configure critical contracts to require on-chain whitelist verification before accepting emissions or reward allocations
checklist_items.description: Ensure Reward Vaults and Distributor contracts validate that any received emission directives or reward distributions are from authorized, whitelisted addresses.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Validator can exploit a flaw in the Whitelist verification logic to direct emissions to unapproved vaults.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement on-chain whitelist checks within Reward Vault and Distributor contracts.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Transaction logs demonstrating whitelist checks during emission and reward distribution.

checklist_items.title: Ensure that reward distribution and incentive logic contracts are thoroughly audited and verified
checklist_items.description: Conduct security audits and formal verification on Reward Vault, Incentive Distributor, and related incentive contracts to prevent vulnerabilities that can be exploited for unfair rewards.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Reward Vault contracts may contain vulnerabilities in their incentive calculation or distribution logic.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Thorough audits and formal verification of reward calculation and distribution logic.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit reports and verification proof logs for reward distribution contracts.

checklist_items.title: Implement multi-signature and timelock controls for administrative actions in Reward Vault and related contracts
checklist_items.description: Ensure all critical administrative functions (e.g., pausing, upgrading) in reward contracts are protected via multi-signature wallets and timelock mechanisms to prevent privilege escalation or unauthorized control.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Reward Vault's administrative controls may be compromised or have vulnerabilities allowing privilege escalation.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Use multi-sig safeguards and timelock mechanisms for admin functions.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Transaction logs showing multisig approval and timelock executions for admin operations.

checklist_items.title: Verify and enforce transaction parameters explicitly in user wallets before signing
checklist_items.description: Require users to review all transaction details explicitly in their wallet interface before signing, especially for complex transactions like swaps, staking, or minting.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Users do not carefully verify transaction details before signing, leading to tampering risk.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Wallets should display all transaction parameters prominently and require user acknowledgment before signing.
checklist_items.evidence_required: User reviews, wallet confirmation logs, and UI/UX compliance audits.

checklist_items.title: Deploy RSA or ECC signatures in off-chain proofs to prevent tampering and spoofing in incentive claims
checklist_items.description: Use cryptographically secure signature schemes in off-chain proof generation and validation to prevent tampering or impersonation during incentive claiming processes.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The off-chain proof generation process or backend service could be compromised, leading to fraudulent incentives.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Use cryptographically secure signatures (e.g., RSA, ECC) for all off-chain proofs; validate signatures on-chain.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Signed proofs and validation logs demonstrating cryptographic verification.

checklist_items.title: Implement strong authentication for governance proposal submissions
checklist_items.description: Verify that the governance proposal creation process requires cryptographic signatures or wallet-based authentication linked to verified identities.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: A malicious actor managed to get a harmful proposal approved by $BGT voters.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Enforce wallet-based signatures and multi-signature approval for proposals.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit logs showing proposal signatures linked to verified identities.

checklist_items.title: Verify whitelisted status of Reward Vaults before directing emissions
checklist_items.description: Ensure that the system performing $BGT emissions to Reward Vaults verifies that each vault is whitelisted and active before distribution.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Validator can exploit a flaw to direct emissions to non-whitelisted vaults.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement on-chain verification and transparent monitoring of reward vault whitelist status.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit records showing emission transactions validated against whitelist.

checklist_items.title: Use secure, verified RPC endpoints for user interactions
checklist_items.description: Verify that users connect only to official, cryptographically verified RPC endpoints to prevent spoofing and MitM attacks.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Users might connect to malicious RPCs that collect or alter data.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Distribute and educate about official RPC endpoints; implement domain verification in wallets.
checklist_items.evidence_required: User reports or wallet logs confirming use of verified RPCs.
checklist_items.owner: User Education and Wallet Development Team

checklist_items.title: Implement effective anti-phishing protections for interface URLs
checklist_items.description: Ensure users verify the domain and authenticity of the dApp interface before signing transactions, to prevent spoofing and phishing.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Users can be deceived by fake website interfaces.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Use official URLs, educate users on verifying domain authenticity, and implement wallet warnings for suspicious sites.
checklist_items.evidence_required: User training records and wallet feature documentation.

checklist_items.title: Require on-chain proof of proposal actions for accountability
checklist_items.description: Ensure that all critical proposal actions are recorded with cryptographic signatures or on-chain attestations, enabling non-repudiation and auditability.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The governance process might be manipulated to deny or misattribute actions.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement digital signatures and store activity logs immutably on-chain.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Blockchain transaction records with signatures linking actions to proposers.

checklist_items.title: Enforce rigorous input validation and verification for transaction parameters
checklist_items.description: Verify that all user-initiated transactions (e.g., swaps, stake, redeem) are validated against expected formats, limits, and known good data, both client-side and smart contract-side.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: User interface or wallet could be compromised, leading to tampering with transaction data.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement strict validation routines in smart contracts and client interfaces.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Test reports and audit results demonstrating validation correctness.

checklist_items.title: Utilize hardware wallets and confirm transaction details before signing
checklist_items.description: Encourage validators and users to verify critical transaction details (amounts, addresses, parameters) using hardware wallets or trusted interfaces before signing.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Users may sign tampered transactions if not verifying in trusted environments.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Promote hardware wallet usage and user training for transaction verification.
checklist_items.evidence_required: User confirmation records and wallet usage logs.

checklist_items.title: Implement strong authentication linking forum accounts to on-chain identities
checklist_items.description: Require that all RFRV submissions are authenticated via on-chain wallet signatures to prevent impersonation.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Governance Forum lacks strong authentication mechanisms to verify the identity of the user submitting the RFRV.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement strong authentication (e.g., linking forum account to on-chain identity, SSO)
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit logs showing forum accounts linked to verified on-chain identities.

checklist_items.title: Restrict on-chain disclosure of sensitive participant information
checklist_items.description: Minimize storage of detailed vesting and allocation data on-chain or in accessible off-chain databases, enforcing strict access controls.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The exact vesting details for each contributor are stored on-chain or off-chain and are not intended to be public.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Minimize on-chain storage of personally identifiable or highly specific individual vesting details; secure off-chain databases.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Access control implementation documentation; audit logs for sensitive data access.

checklist_items.title: Conduct security audits and formal verification of the Reward Vault contracts
checklist_items.description: Ensure that all Reward Vault smart contracts undergo rigorous security audits, including formal verification of access controls and incentive logic.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Reward Vault contracts may contain vulnerabilities exploitable by attackers.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Conduct thorough security audits and formal verification before deployment.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit reports; formal verification documents.

checklist_items.title: Implement multi-signature and timelock mechanisms for critical governance actions
checklist_items.description: Require multiple authorized signatures and enforce timelocks on proposal cancellations and administrative changes to prevent privilege escalation and improper actions.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Timelock contracts rely on multi-signature signatures requiring consensus of Guardians.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement multi-signature approval and enforce timelocks for sensitive governance operations.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Smart contract code review; multisig approval logs.

checklist_items.title: Establish secure key management and operational security for Validator keys
checklist_items.description: Use hardware security modules, multisig approvals, and regular audits to safeguard Validator private keys controlling block proposal and emission signing.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Validator keys are used for signing proposals and emissions and are at risk if compromised.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Manage validator keys with hardware wallets, multisig, and strict operational protocols.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Key management policy documentation; audit logs.

checklist_items.title: Verify the authenticity of RPC endpoints before connection
checklist_items.description: Ensure users connect only to verified, official RPC URLs to prevent Man-in-the-Middle and spoofing attacks.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Users may connect to malicious or unverified RPC endpoints, exposing metadata or enabling MitM attacks.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Use official RPC URLs; implement domain verification and warnings in wallet software.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Wallet configuration logs; RPC verification procedures.

checklist_items.title: Employ HTTPS and certificate pinning for RPC communication
checklist_items.description: Protect RPC communications against interception and tampering by enforcing HTTPS and certificate pinning on wallet applications.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: RPC communications are vulnerable to MitM if not secured.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Enforce HTTPS; implement certificate pinning in wallet apps.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Security architecture review; test logs demonstrating HTTPS enforcement.

checklist_items.title: Implement strong authentication linking forum accounts to on-chain identities
checklist_items.description: Verify that forum users submitting RFRVs are authenticated via wallets or verified through secure identity protocols to prevent impersonation.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Governance Forum lacks strong authentication mechanisms to verify the identity of the user submitting the RFRV.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement strong authentication (e.g., linking forum account to on-chain identity, SSO)
checklist_items.evidence_required: Screenshot or audit log showing linked on-chain identity at login.

checklist_items.title: Enforce on-chain verification of proposal authenticity before execution
checklist_items.description: Require that all governance proposals be accompanied by cryptographic signatures or on-chain attestations to prevent spoofing or unauthorized execution.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The process for recording and finalizing review decisions by the BGT Foundation does not create a tamper-proof, attributable record of who made the decision and when.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Maintain secure, immutable, and attributable audit trails of all RFRV review activities and final decisions; utilize group digital signatures or on-chain records.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit logs, signed messages, or on-chain attestations of review decisions.

checklist_items.title: Verify whitelist status of Reward Vaults before distributing emissions
checklist_items.description: Implement on-chain checks to ensure that only Reward Vaults that are properly whitelisted and active receive $BGT emissions, preventing incentive diversion.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: A validator might maliciously or accidentally direct emissions to a Reward Vault that is not properly whitelisted or is faulty.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Strict on-chain verification that target Reward Vaults are whitelisted and active before emissions are processed.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Transaction logs showing verification steps, deployment records of whitelisted vaults.

checklist_items.title: Secure validator keys with multi-signature and hardware security modules
checklist_items.description: Store validator private keys in HSMs or multi-signature wallets and enforce operational security best practices to prevent key compromise that could lead to spoofed emissions or proposals.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The validator's private key used for signing emission direction transactions can be compromised, leading to spoofed emissions.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Use secure hardware wallets, multi-signature key management, and operational security protocols.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit records of key management procedures, hardware wallet deployment records.

checklist_items.title: Implement robust access control and multi-signature requirements for Reward Vault administrative functions
checklist_items.description: Ensure that setting incentive rates, adding tokens, or other admin operations are protected by role-based access control with multi-party signatures to prevent privilege escalation or unauthorized control.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Reward Vault contract's access control for functions like adding incentives or setting rates is flawed or bypassable.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement and audit role-based access control with multi-signature protections for admin functions.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Smart contract code review, access control audit reports.

checklist_items.title: Conduct comprehensive security audits and formal verification of Reward Vault contracts
checklist_items.description: Perform security audits and formal verification on Reward Vaults, especially those developed by third parties, to identify vulnerabilities that could be exploited for tampering or privilege escalation.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Reward Vault contract deployed by a Protocol contains software vulnerabilities that can be exploited.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Engage reputable security firms for audits, and encourage bug bounty programs for Reward Vaults.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit reports, formal verification proofs, bug bounty findings.

checklist_items.title: Implement strong authentication for reward proposal submissions on the Governance Forum
checklist_items.description: Verify that the Governance Forum requires wallet-based login or digital signatures from verified identities to prevent impersonation (Threat ID 16, 17).
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Systems lack strong, verifiable authentication for forum submissions (Threat ID 16, 17).
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Establish wallet-based login or digital signature verification for forum submissions.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit logs showing verified identities linked to submission accounts.

checklist_items.title: Enforce whitelisting and on-chain validation of Reward Vault addresses before accepting emissions (Threat ID 4-7, 91-92)
checklist_items.description: Ensure that the system verifies Reward Vault addresses against a strict whitelist on-chain before directing $BGT emissions to prevent directing funds to malicious or untrusted vaults.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Validator or admin can maliciously direct emissions to untrusted vaults due to inadequate validation (Threat ID 4-7, 91-92).
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement on-chain whitelist checks in emission distribution contracts.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Verified smart contract code with whitelist verification logic.

checklist_items.title: Require multi-factor authentication and secure key management for validator signing keys used in emission directives (Threat ID 85-91)
checklist_items.description: Ensure validator keys that sign emission or proposal transactions are securely stored in hardware wallets or multi-sig setups to prevent unauthorized control and spoofing (Threat ID 85-91).
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Validator private keys are vulnerable to theft or compromise, enabling spoofed emission directions (Threat ID 85-91).
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Use hardware security modules and multi-signature processes for key management.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit logs of key access and storage infrastructure.

checklist_items.title: Implement comprehensive security audits and formal verification for Reward Vault smart contracts (Threat ID 40-43, 59-60)
checklist_items.description: Conduct rigorous code audits and formal verification of Reward Vault contracts to prevent vulnerabilities that could enable tampering, denial of service, or privilege escalation.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Reward Vault smart contracts are vulnerable to exploits due to flawed or unverified code (Threat ID 40-43).
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Engage reputable auditors and formal verification tools for critical smart contracts.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit reports, formal verification proofs.

checklist_items.title: Deploy reward distribution and incentive mechanisms with adherence to secure, multi-sig governance and timelock controls (Threat ID 15-17, 85-89)
checklist_items.description: Ensure that all administrative actions affecting reward emission, incentive parameters, and governance proposals are protected by multi-sig and timelock controls to prevent privilege escalation and unauthorized modifications.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Administrative controls may be flawed or weak, enabling privilege escalation or unauthorized actions (Threat ID 15-17, 85-89).
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement multi-sig, enforce timelocks, and audit administrative operations.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Operational procedures, multisig invocation logs.

checklist_items.title: Establish verified listing process and ongoing validation for Reward Vault smart contracts to prevent deployment of malicious or vulnerable contracts (Threat ID 24-26, 40-42)
checklist_items.description: Set up a secure, transparent, and vetted process for deploying Reward Vaults, including code audits, audits of deployers, and whitelist approval, to prevent malicious or low-security vaults from being active.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Unvetted or malicious Reward Vault contracts may be deployed without oversight (Threat ID 24-26, 40-42).
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement community-verified whitelisting, code audits, and deployment procedures.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Approval records, audit certificates, whitelist registry.

checklist_items.title: Implement strong authentication mechanisms for forum submissions to verify submitter identities.
checklist_items.description: Verify if the Governance Forum requires validators or project submitters to authenticate via secure, on-chain identities to prevent impersonation or spoofing of RFRV submissions.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Governance Forum (Component 223) lacks robust mechanisms to verify the true identity of RFRV submitters.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement strong authentication (e.g., digital signatures linked to verified on-chain identities).
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit logs showing linked on-chain identities associated with forum accounts.

checklist_items.title: Ensure all governance proposals require multi-party approval or guardian oversight before execution.
checklist_items.description: Mitigate risks of malicious proposals by enforcing multi-party or guardian approval protocols, especially for proposals with high impact, to prevent single-actor malicious actions.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The BGT Foundation's proposal approval process might be vulnerable to single-actor malicious proposals if not properly overseen.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Establish multi-signature approval protocols or guardian oversight for proposal passage.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Protocol documentation showing approval process and logs of proposal approvals.

checklist_items.title: Implement robust on-chain verification of Reward Vault whitelisting status before accepting emissions.
checklist_items.description: Check that the smart contracts responsible for directing $BGT emissions verify the vault's whitelist status on-chain before transferring funds, to prevent directing tokens to unauthorized or malicious vaults.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Reward Vault (Component 209) may not perform on-chain validation of whitelist status before receiving emissions.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Add on-chain whitelist checks in emission distribution contracts.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Smart contract audit reports confirming whitelist verification logic.

checklist_items.title: Secure private keys of Validator nodes using hardware security modules (HSMs) or multisignature wallets.
checklist_items.description: Verify that Validator key management practices include hardware module usage or multisignature safeguards to prevent key compromise and spoofing of block proposals.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Validator private keys are not secured against theft or compromise, risking spoofed block proposals.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement hardware security modules or multisig controls for Validator keys.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Key management policy documentation and audit logs of key storage practices.

checklist_items.title: Establish incident response plan for rapid Validator key revocation and node replacement.
checklist_items.description: Ensure protocols are in place to revoke and replace Validator keys swiftly if compromised, minimizing the window of impersonation and spoofing attacks.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: There is no rapid response plan in place for Validator key compromise, increasing spoofing risks.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Create incident response protocols including key revocation, node shutdown, and key rotation procedures.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Approval and testing records of incident response plan drills.

checklist_items.title: Deploy anti-phishing tools and user education to verify legitimate DEX and bridge interfaces.
checklist_items.description: Verify that users are educated and equipped with tools to distinguish official interfaces from spoofed ones, mitigating spoofing attacks during token swaps and bridge operations.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Users are vulnerable to phishing sites mimicking DEX and bridge interfaces, leading to fund loss.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Provide user education, official site verifications, and browser security warnings.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Training materials, user feedback, and documented security awareness campaigns.

checklist_items.title: Implement on-chain access control checks for functions involved in proposal creation, voting, and administrative actions.
checklist_items.description: Verify that smart contracts enforce strict access control and signature verification for all governance-related functions to prevent privilege escalation or unauthorized actions.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Governance contracts do not currently verify signatures and access levels for proposal and vote submissions.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Integrate role-based access control and cryptographic signature verification in governance contracts.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Smart contract code audits confirming access restrictions and signature validation logic.

checklist_items.title: Enforce strong authentication for forum submissions to prevent spoofing of RFRV proposals
checklist_items.description: Implement cryptographic verification or wallet-based login to ensure that only verified identities can submit RFRV proposals, mitigating impersonation risk.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Governance Forum lacks strong authentication mechanisms to verify the identity of the user submitting the RFRV.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement strong authentication (e.g., linking forum account to on-chain identity, SSO)
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit logs showing verification methods for forum account ownership.

checklist_items.title: Implement on-chain verification of governance proposal authorship to prevent repudiation and attribution issues
checklist_items.description: Require that RFRV proposals submitted to the governance system are accompanied by a cryptographic signature or on-chain attestations linking the proposal to an official project address, mitigating repudiation concerns.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The process for recording and finalizing review decisions by the BGT Foundation does not create a tamper-proof, attributable record.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Establish on-chain signatures or multi-party verified attestations for proposals.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Sample proposal with attached cryptographic signature or on-chain attestation.

checklist_items.title: Secure storage and management of validator private keys to prevent escalation of privilege in block proposal and reward distribution processes
checklist_items.description: Implement hardware security modules (HSMs), multi-signature schemes, and operational security best practices for validator keys used in proposing blocks and signing reward distributions, mitigating privilege escalation.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Validator's block signing key can be compromised, enabling spoofing or rewarding exploitation.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Use of hardware wallets, multi-signature signatories, key rotation policies, and secure key vaults.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Key management procedures, hardware wallet certification, key access logs.

checklist_items.title: Regular security audits and formal verification of Reward Vault and Incentive Distribution contracts
checklist_items.description: Conduct comprehensive audits and formal verification of Reward Vault and Incentive Distributor smart contracts to identify and fix vulnerabilities that could be exploited for tampering, privilege escalation, or DoS.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Reward Vault contracts may contain vulnerabilities exploitable by malicious actors.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Security audits, formal verification procedures, bug bounty programs.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit reports, formal verification documents, bug bounty reports.

checklist_items.title: Implement multi-signature and timelock controls for administrative functions in Reward Vault contracts
checklist_items.description: Require multi-party signatures and timelocks for sensitive administrative operations (e.g., pausing, upgrading, changing parameters) within Reward Vault contracts to prevent unauthorized privilege escalation.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Administrative controls are vulnerable to abuse or compromise, leading to privilege escalation.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Use of multisignature wallets, timelock mechanisms, strict access control policies.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Smart contract code, administrative access logs, multisignature transaction records.

checklist_items.title: Configure and enforce strict whitelist verification for Reward Vaults receiving $BGT emissions
checklist_items.description: Implement on-chain checks to verify that $BGT emissions are directed only to whitelisted and active Reward Vaults, preventing misdirection or transfer to malicious or unapproved contracts.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Validator can direct $BGT emissions to non-whitelisted or malicious vaults.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: On-chain whitelist enforcement, continuous monitoring, reporting mechanisms.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Transaction logs showing emission targets, whitelist status records.

checklist_items.title: Implement robust access control mechanisms for $BGT emission directives in Reward Vaults
checklist_items.description: Secure the emission control functions to ensure only authorized, properly authenticated validators can direct $BGT emissions, using role-based access control and multisignature approval where appropriate.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Validator's private key for emission directives is subject to compromise, enabling spoofing.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Role-based access control, multi-signature authorization, secure key management procedures.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Access control policies, key management practices, signature verification logs.

checklist_items.title: Implement strong authentication mechanisms for governance proposals and RFRV submissions
checklist_items.description: Ensure all proposal and RFRV submissions are verified via cryptographic signatures linked to verified on-chain identities.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Governance Forum lacks strong authentication mechanisms to verify the identity of the user submitting the RFRV.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Require cryptographic signatures from verified on-chain identities for all submissions.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit logs showing signed submissions linked to verified addresses.

checklist_items.title: Configure smart contracts to enforce whitelisting and integrity checks before accepting incentive emissions or token transfers
checklist_items.description: Implement on-chain validation to verify that only whitelisted Reward Vaults receive emissions and that transmission parameters are validated.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Reward Vault contract might not properly authenticate that the caller is the designated Token Manager.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Use access controls and require multi-signature approval for critical functions like adding incentives.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Smart contract audit reports verifying access control mechanisms.

checklist_items.title: Secure private keys of validators and token managers using hardware security modules or multi-signature schemes
checklist_items.description: Implement hardware wallets, multisig, and operational security best practices to prevent private key compromise, reducing the risk of spoofed emissions or unauthorized actions.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Validator's key is used for signing emission direction transactions or admin functions.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Deploy keys on secure hardware wallets, enforce multi-factor approval processes.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Key management policy documentation and hardware wallet deployment logs.

checklist_items.title: Perform regular security audits and formal verification on smart contracts managing rewards, staking, and governance
checklist_items.description: Conduct thorough audits and formal verification to identify and fix vulnerabilities leading to tampering, privilege escalation, or DoS.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Reward Vault and governance contracts could contain exploitable vulnerabilities.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Engage reputable auditors and use formal verification tools for smart contract code.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit reports, formal verification results, and remediation plans.

checklist_items.title: Implement on-chain access controls to prevent unauthorized function calls in reward and governance contracts
checklist_items.description: Use role-based access control, multisig, and timelocks for privileged functions like setting rates, whitelisting vaults, or administrative changes.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Reward vault and governance contracts may have flawed or insufficient access controls.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Design contracts with role-based permissions, enforce multisignature and timelock mechanisms.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Smart contract source code reviews, permission audits.

checklist_items.title: Establish secure communication channels and multi-factor verification for off-chain governance communications
checklist_items.description: Ensure all off-chain governance communications, reviews, and decision logs are secured via multi-factor authentication, digital signatures, and encrypted channels.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Review decisions might be communicated off-chain without authentication.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Use cryptographic signatures and secure communication channels for governance decisions.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Signed messages, audit logs of communication channels.

checklist_items.title: Implement monitoring and incident response procedures to detect and mitigate DoS attacks on critical components
checklist_items.description: Establish network monitoring, rate limiting, and incident response plans to respond swiftly to DoS attacks targeting RPC endpoints, voting, or reward distribution contracts.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: RPC endpoints and contract interactions can be targeted for DoS attacks.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Deploy infrastructure with DDoS protection, set rate limits, and establish incident response protocols.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Monitoring dashboards, incident response plans, past incident logs.

checklist_items.title: Educate users on verifying contract addresses and using official interfaces to prevent spoofing
checklist_items.description: Promote operational security best practices, including verifying website URLs, smart contract addresses, and using hardware wallets to mitigate spoofing and phishing risks.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Users may be tricked by phishing sites or malicious interfaces.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: User training and official communication channels.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Training materials, user acknowledgments.

checklist_items.title: Enforce strict input validation and transaction review in wallets and dApps
checklist_items.description: Ensure that all transaction parameters (amounts, addresses, function calls) are explicitly shown and verified before signing, reducing tampering risk.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Transactions can be tampered with before user signs them in compromised wallets or UI.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Wallets should display detailed transaction info for confirmation.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Wallet UI screenshots, code reviews of wallet verification processes.

checklist_items.title: Implement strong on-chain verification for RFRV submissions
checklist_items.description: Ensure that all RFRV submissions are verified through cryptographic proofs linked to verified on-chain identities to prevent impersonation or spoofing.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Governance Forum lacks strong authentication mechanisms to verify the identity of the user submitting the RFRV.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement strong authentication (e.g., linking forum account to on-chain identity, SSO)
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit logs showing verified on-chain identities tied to forum submissions.

checklist_items.title: Require multi-factor authentication (MFA) for administrative actions and proposal submissions
checklist_items.description: Mandate MFA solutions for BGT Foundation members to prevent privilege escalation or unauthorized proposal creation/tampering.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Weak access controls or compromised accounts could allow unauthorized manipulation of RFRV review and proposal processes.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement multi-factor authentication (MFA) for all Foundation member accounts and critical system access.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Configuration audit showing MFA enforced across all relevant accounts.

checklist_items.title: Ensure consistency and authenticity of governance proposals via digital signatures
checklist_items.description: Require that all governance proposals are signed with the private key of the submitting entity, and signatures are verified on-chain to prevent tampering or repudiation.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The process for recording and finalizing review decisions does not create a tamper-proof, attributable record of who made the decision.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Require proposal signatures with verified on-chain signatures from authorized key holders.
checklist_items.evidence_required: On-chain verification logs showing valid signatures linked to proposal origin.

checklist_items.title: Implement secure communication channels for Guardian coordination
checklist_items.description: Establish encrypted and confidential communication protocols among Guardians to prevent leakage of sensitive governance decision information.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Leakage of Guardians' intent to cancel a proposal before the action is taken, potentially through insecure off-chain channels or a compromised Guardian.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Use secure messaging platforms with end-to-end encryption and access controls for Guardian discussions.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit logs of Guardian communications demonstrating use of secure channels.

checklist_items.title: Conduct comprehensive smart contract audits on Reward Vaults before deployment
checklist_items.description: Perform thorough security audits and formal verification of the Reward Vault contracts to identify and fix potential vulnerabilities allowing tampering or exploits.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Reward Vault contracts deployed might contain vulnerabilities in their code.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Engage reputable security firms for audits and formal verification procedures.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit certificates and reports confirming secure deployment.

checklist_items.title: Implement multisig and timelock controls for administrative operations
checklist_items.description: Use multisignature wallets and timelock mechanisms for critical admin functions in Reward Vaults to mitigate privilege escalation and unauthorized control.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Administrative controls may be weak or keys could be compromised.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Deploy multisig wallets (e.g., 3-of-5) and enforce timelocks on all admin functions.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Configuration audits showing multisig and timelock enabled for all administrative actions.

checklist_items.title: Provide user education on verifying transaction details and recognizing phishing sites
checklist_items.description: Educate users to carefully review transaction details such as contract addresses, transaction parameters, and to only interact with official sites and wallets.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Users may not reliably verify the authenticity of the interface or transaction details.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Distribute educational materials and conduct community awareness campaigns.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Training completion records and user feedback surveys.

checklist_items.title: Enforce on-chain access control for Reward Vault functions
checklist_items.description: Modify Reward Vault smart contracts to include strict role-based access control, allowing only authorized addresses (e.g., multisig wallet) to manage incentive parameters and tokens.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Reward Vault contract may have flawed access control logic.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement role-based access controls using established libraries like OpenZeppelin's AccessControl.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Smart contract source code with access control modifiers and audit reports.

checklist_items.title: Set up monitoring and alerts for governance proposal activities
checklist_items.description: Deploy observability tools to track proposal submissions, vote activations, and execution, enabling quick detection of suspicious or unauthorized activities.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The process lacks real-time monitoring of governance activities.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Install dedicated monitoring tools, set alerts for anomalies.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Logs, monitoring dashboards, alert configurations.

checklist_items.title: Implement strong on-chain identity verification for participants submitting RFRV proposals
checklist_items.description: Verify that the Governance Forum enforces wallet-based login or cryptographic proof linking a submission to a verified on-chain identity to prevent impersonation.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Governance Forum lacks strong authentication mechanisms to verify the identity of the user submitting the RFRV.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement strong authentication (e.g., linking forum account to on-chain identity, SSO)
checklist_items.evidence_required: Screenshot or audit log showing linked on-chain identity at login.

checklist_items.title: Establish secure communication channels for Guardians to discuss proposal cancellations
checklist_items.description: Ensure Guardians coordinate and discuss proposal cancellations over confidential, encrypted messaging or secure off-chain channels to prevent early leakage of cancellation plans.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Guardians coordinate or discuss potential cancellations off-chain before executing the multisig transaction.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Establish secure and confidential communication channels for Guardian coordination.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Recordings or logs of Guardian communications demonstrating use of secure channels.

checklist_items.title: Verify that multi-signature for proposal cancellations requires at least 5 Guardian signatures
checklist_items.description: Audit the multisig implementation to ensure it enforces the 5-out-of-9 signatures requirement correctly for proposal cancellations.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: A vulnerability in the Timelock Contract's multisig validation logic for proposal cancellations could allow bypassing the 5-of-9 consensus requirement.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Rigorous smart contract audits and formal verification of the multisig logic.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit reports confirming multisig enforcement of signature threshold.

checklist_items.title: Implement on-chain verification of Reward Vault whitelist status before emission transfer
checklist_items.description: Ensure the reward distribution system checks the whitelist status of Reward Vaults on-chain prior to directing $BGT emissions to prevent directing funds to unapproved or malicious vaults.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: A validator might maliciously or accidentally direct emissions to non-whitelisted or faulty vaults.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: On-chain verification of Reward Vault whitelist status before emissions processing.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Smart contract code or logs showing whitelist verification during emission transfer.

checklist_items.title: Require multi-factor authentication for admin actions on Reward Vault contracts
checklist_items.description: Add multi-factor authentication or multisignature requirements for administrative functions (e.g., pausing, upgrading) in Reward Vaults to prevent privilege escalation via key compromise.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The administrative controls of Reward Vaults may be compromised if private keys are stolen.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Use hardware wallets, multisignature governance, and secure operational procedures for admin keys.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Operational procedures documentation and key management protocols.

checklist_items.title: Audit the access control mechanisms of Reward Vault contracts for proper role restrictions
checklist_items.description: Perform security audits on Reward Vault smart contracts to ensure only authorized accounts can perform sensitive functions such as adding incentives or changing rates.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: An unauthorized entity could call functions on Reward Vaults intended only for the designated Token Manager.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement and verify robust role-based access control in smart contracts.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Code review reports and access control policy documentation.

checklist_items.title: Ensure all reward distribution logic in Reward Vault contracts is thoroughly tested and formally verified
checklist_items.description: Conduct formal verification and comprehensive testing of the reward and incentive calculation mechanisms in Reward Vaults to prevent exploits and underflows/overflows.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Reward Vaults may have flaws allowing unfair gain or theft of rewards.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Formal verification and rigorous audits of reward logic.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Verification reports and test logs showing coverage of reward calculation functions.

checklist_items.title: Implement wormhole or relay security measures for cross-chain transactions to prevent spoofing and tampering
checklist_items.description: Use secure, authenticated relay mechanisms for cross-chain asset transfers and message passing to prevent spoofed or malicious data injection.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Attacker can deploy a malicious smart contract or perform relay message tampering during cross-chain operations.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Use secure relay protocols with cryptographic proofs and attestation.
checklist_items.evidence_required: On-chain verification of relay proofs and relay node audits.

checklist_items.title: Ensure all smart contracts related to bridge operations are audited for re-entrancy and access control flaws
checklist_items.description: Perform security audits on bridge smart contracts to prevent re-entrancy exploits and privilege escalation during asset transfer and minting.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The bridge's smart contracts may contain vulnerabilities enabling exploitative re-entrancy or unauthorized minting.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Regular security audits and formal verification of the bridge contracts.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit reports verifying absence of re-entrancy and privilege escalation vulnerabilities.

checklist_items.title: Implement strong user authentication for RFRV submissions to prevent impersonation
checklist_items.description: Verify that the Governance Forum enforces wallet-based login or equivalent secure identity verification for users submitting RFRVs.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Governance Forum lacks strong authentication mechanisms to verify the identity of the user submitting the RFRV.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement strong authentication (e.g., linking forum account to on-chain identity, SSO)
checklist_items.evidence_required: Snapshot or audit log showing linked on-chain identities for RFRV submitters.

checklist_items.title: Enforce on-chain verification of reward vault whitelist status before accepting emissions
checklist_items.description: Audit smart contract logic to ensure emissions can only be directed to whitelisted Reward Vaults, preventing diversion to malicious or unapproved contracts.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The system currently does not strictly enforce whitelist checks during emission transactions.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Review and audit contract code to include explicit whitelist verification before emission transfer.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit report confirming whitelist enforcement in emission functions.

checklist_items.title: Require private key protection measures for all validator administrative keys
checklist_items.description: Verify that all validator admin keys are stored securely using hardware security modules (HSMs), multisig wallets, or other robust key management solutions.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Validator admin keys are used to control administrative functions and are potentially high-value assets.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Deploy keys in HSM devices, enforce multi-signature requirements, and implement operational security procedures.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Key management policy documentation and verification of key storage practices.

checklist_items.title: Implement transaction signing in secure hardware wallets with user verification of transaction details
checklist_items.description: Ensure that users sign transactions only after explicitly reviewing all transaction parameters in a hardware wallet display.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Users might be unaware of tampering if they do not verify transaction details before signing.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Require or recommend the use of hardware wallets with on-screen transaction confirmation.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Record of user education efforts and verification procedures.

checklist_items.title: Deploy and enforce anti-phishing measures for wallet and dApp interface access
checklist_items.description: Use domain verification, browser security features, and user warnings to prevent interaction with fake interfaces during token bridge, swap, or minting procedures.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Users are vulnerable to interacting with malicious site clones or phishing interfaces.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement domain verification, user education, and browser warnings for phishing sites.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit logs of user interactions and phishing detection reports.

checklist_items.title: Ensure all smart contracts involved in minting, redeeming, and staking are audited for reentrancy, overflow, and access control vulnerabilities
checklist_items.description: Conduct comprehensive security audits and formal verification of all relevant smart contracts to prevent exploits, tampering, and privilege escalations.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Reward vault and minting contracts are critical assets that may contain vulnerabilities if not properly audited.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Audit and formally verify smart contracts before deployment, leveraging reputable security firms and formal methods.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit reports and verification certificates.

checklist_items.title: Establish a strict change management and review process for contract upgrades and critical operations
checklist_items.description: Implement governance and multi-signature requirements for any contract upgrades, parameter changes, or administrative actions to prevent unauthorized privilege escalation.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Contract administrators can modify or upgrade contracts with high privileges, risking privilege escalation if not properly controlled.
