checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Use governance proposals with multi-signature or timelock for administrative changes.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Governance process documentation and records of contract upgrades.

checklist_items.title: Verify that all proposal and voting mechanisms are protected against manipulation of threshold checks and enumeration attacks
checklist_items.description: Implement rigorous audits and formal verification of proposal creation, voting, and tallying logic to ensure integrity and fairness.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The governance system relies solely on on-chain data and check logic that may be vulnerable to manipulation.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Formal verification and thorough audits of proposal creation and voting logic, including snapshot mechanisms.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit certificates and formal verification results.

checklist_items.title: Configure and monitor the timelock contract to require multi-signature approval and safeguards against single points of failure or compromise
checklist_items.description: Implement multi-signature and threshold security measures for all governance proposal cancellations to prevent spoofing or unauthorized cancellations.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The current multisig setup can be compromised if private keys are stolen or insufficiently secured.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Ensure multisig is properly configured with a sufficient number of keys, hardware wallets, and security practices.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Verification of multisig configuration and security controls.

checklist_items.title: Implement strong authentication for forum submissions to verify identity.
checklist_items.description: Verify that the system requires wallet-based or cryptographic authentication for users submitting RFRV proposals to ensure they are verified before acceptance.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Governance Forum lacks strong authentication mechanisms to verify the identity of the user submitting the RFRV.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement strong authentication (e.g., linking forum account to on-chain identity, SSO)
checklist_items.evidence_required: Screenshot or audit log showing linked on-chain identity at login.

checklist_items.title: Enforce on-chain verification of Reward Vault whitelist status before emission.
checklist_items.description: Ensure that the emission process verifies that the target Reward Vault is whitelisted and active on-chain prior to transferring $BGT tokens, preventing emissions to malicious or unverified vaults.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: A validator might maliciously or accidentally direct emissions to non-whitelisted vaults.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Strict on-chain verification that target Reward Vaults are whitelisted and active before emissions are processed.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit logs demonstrating whitelist checks during emission transactions.

checklist_items.title: Conduct comprehensive security audits for Reward Vault deployments.
checklist_items.description: Before deploying new Reward Vault smart contracts, conduct thorough security audits focusing on potential vulnerabilities to prevent exploits that could lead to fund loss or system downtime.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Reward Vault contracts might contain vulnerabilities.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Rigorous security audits by reputable firms, follow secure development practices.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit reports and certification documentation for deployed contracts.

checklist_items.title: Secure private keys of validator nodes with multi-factor and hardware security modules.
checklist_items.description: Implement multi-factor authentication and hardware security modules to protect validator private keys used for signing emission directives and proposing blocks to prevent spoofing and elevation of privilege attacks.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Validator keys can be compromised, leading to malicious activities such as spoofed proposals and emission diversion.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Use hardware wallets, HSMs, and enforce operational security best practices.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Configuration audit logs and key access control records.

checklist_items.title: Implement threshold multisignature and timelock for privileged administrative functions.
checklist_items.description: Configure Reward Vault administrative controls to require multi-signature approval and timelocks for critical actions such as parameter changes or upgrades, reducing risk from privilege escalation and tampering.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Administrative controls may be vulnerable to compromise or misuse.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Strict role-based access, multisig, timelock enforcement, and operational security practices.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Transaction logs, multisig approval records, and policy documentation.

checklist_items.title: Verify the legitimacy of RPC endpoints before use.
checklist_items.description: Educate users and implement app-level checks to ensure RPC URLs are verified against official sources to prevent connection to malicious or phishing RPCs.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Users might connect to malicious RPC endpoints.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Use only official RPC URLs and implement warnings for untrusted endpoints.
checklist_items.evidence_required: User confirmation logs and domain verification records.

checklist_items.title: Implement transaction parameter confirmation in user wallet interfaces.
checklist_items.description: Design wallet interfaces to explicitly display and confirm all critical transaction parameters (amounts, addresses, contract details) before signing, to prevent tampering by malware or malicious frontends.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Users do not verify transaction details before signing.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Wallet UI must clearly display all params and require explicit confirmation.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Screenshots or logs of user confirmations with transaction details.

checklist_items.title: Maintain immutable, on-chain audit logs for governance actions.
checklist_items.description: Ensure that all governance proposals, votes, and decisions are recorded on-chain in a tamper-proof manner, establishing clear attribution and supporting dispute resolution.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Governance decision records may not be securely logged.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Use on-chain signatures, multi-party approvals, and audit trail mechanisms.
checklist_items.evidence_required: On-chain signatures, proposal event logs, and audit reports.

checklist_items.title: Use secure, tamper-evident communication channels for Guardian multisig operations.
checklist_items.description: Implement communication and signature aggregation processes that are resistant to interception and forgery, ensuring proposal cancellations and governance-critical actions are protected.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Multisig signature aggregation may be vulnerable to tampering or compromise.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Use secure messaging protocols, multi-party secure signing, and off-chain aggregation with on-chain verification.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Secure logs of multisig signing sessions and communication protocols.

checklist_items.title: Implement strong authentication linking forum submissions to on-chain identities to prevent impersonation.
checklist_items.description: Verify if forum requires wallet-based login or digital signatures tied to on-chain identities for RFRV submissions.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Governance Forum (223) does not have robust mechanisms, such as wallet-based login, to verify the submitter's identity.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement wallet login, digital signature verification, or on-chain identity linkage.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit logs showing verified wallet identities associated with forum submissions.

checklist_items.title: Enforce on-chain verification of recipient addresses and transaction parameters before signing to prevent tampering.
checklist_items.description: Ensure users review all transaction details (recipient, amount, contract addresses) in their wallet before signing to detect any unauthorized modifications.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Users do not verify transaction details before signing, making them vulnerable to tampering.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement wallet UI prompts that display transaction data for review, and educate users to verify details.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Screenshots or logs of user confirming transaction details in wallets.

checklist_items.title: Configure RPC endpoints to use HTTPS and enforce network security practices to prevent man-in-the-middle attacks.
checklist_items.description: Ensure all wallet connections to RPC endpoints (Component 220) are secured with TLS to prevent tampering or data leakage.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: RPC communication is susceptible to MitM attacks if not secured.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Enforce HTTPS, use VPNs or private networks, and verify RPC endpoint authenticity.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Configuration files, network connection logs showing TLS usage.

checklist_items.title: Deploy anti-phishing measures such as domain verification and user education to prevent spoofed interface attacks.
checklist_items.description: Educate users and implement domain checks to ensure interactions occur only with official interfaces for minting, redeeming, or swapping tokens.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Users cannot reliably distinguish spoofed interfaces from legitimate ones.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Verify domain authenticity, use reputation services, and inform users about official URLs.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Training materials, domain validation reports.

checklist_items.title: Implement rigorous security audits and formal verification for smart contracts managing reward distribution and vaults.
checklist_items.description: Regularly audit Reward Vault, Incentive Distributor, and Bridge contracts to prevent vulnerabilities that could be exploited for tampering or DoS.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Reward vaults and bridges may contain exploitable vulnerabilities.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Conduct code audits, formal verification, and incentivize bug bounty programs.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit reports, verification certificates, bug bounty submission summaries.

checklist_items.title: Configure multisignature and timelock controls for administrative functions in reward and bridge contracts.
checklist_items.description: Use multisig wallets and timelocks on admin functions like pausing, upgrading, or changing emission parameters to prevent privilege escalation and rapid malicious changes.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Admin functions may be vulnerable to privilege escalation if controls are weak.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement multisig with hardware wallets, enforce multi-party approval, and timelocks for critical actions.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Governance scripts, multisig approval logs, timelock configurations.

checklist_items.title: Establish secure key management and operational security procedures for validator keys and admin controls.
checklist_items.description: Protect private keys of validators and administrators with hardware security modules (HSMs), multi-party signatures, and strict operational protocols.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Validator keys and admin credentials are vulnerable to compromise.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Use hardware wallets, enforce MFA, secure backups, and security audits.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Key management policies, HSM configurations, access logs.

checklist_items.title: Set up monitoring and anomaly detection for governance proposals and review activities.
checklist_items.description: Implement logging and alerts for suspicious governance activities, such as rapid proposal submissions or irregular voting patterns.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Governance system may be exploited for proposal spam or tampering.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Configure on-chain event logging, off-chain monitoring tools, and alerting systems.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Monitoring dashboards, audit logs, alert configuration files.

checklist_items.title: Require signatures from multiple guardians or community members for proposal cancellations and critical governance actions.
checklist_items.description: Distribute authority for cancellations and other sensitive governance operations among multiple trusted parties with multisig approvals.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Single guardian keys or unverified signatures could allow privilege escalation or unauthorized cancellation.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement multisig approval, threshold signatures, or group consensus for governance actions.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Governance approval records, multisig transaction logs.

checklist_items.title: Implement off-chain communication confidentiality protocols for guardians to prevent premature leaks.
checklist_items.description: Require guardians to use secure, encrypted communication channels (e.g., Signal, PGP, VPN) for sensitive governance discussions.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Guardians may discuss proposals off-chain without secure communication protocols.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Adopt secure communication platforms, enforce operational security standards.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Encrypted communication logs, operational security policies.

checklist_items.title: Verify implementation of strong authentication mechanisms for governance proposal submissions
checklist_items.description: Ensure that the system requires wallet-based login or digital signatures linked to on-chain identities for all proposal submissions to prevent spoofing and impersonation.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The governance system lacks verifiable authentication mechanisms to confirm submitter identity.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement cryptographic signature verification linked to on-chain identities, and multi-factor authentication mechanisms where applicable.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit logs showing proposal submissions are authenticated via cryptographic signatures tied to verified identities.

checklist_items.title: Implement access controls and regular audits for the Reward Vault smart contracts
checklist_items.description: Ensure that only authorized roles can modify incentive rates and add incentive tokens in Reward Vaults, and that all such operations are logged and audited to prevent privilege escalation and tampering.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Reward Vault contracts are deployed without robust access controls, allowing potential unauthorized modifications.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Use role-based access control, multi-signature authorization for administrative functions, and conduct periodic security audits.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit logs showing access control enforcement and records of administrative actions.

checklist_items.title: Ensure smart contracts involved in token distributions are audited and formally verified
checklist_items.description: Conduct comprehensive security audits and formal verification of reward distribution, incentive calculation, and claim mechanisms to prevent exploits and manipulation.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Reward Vaults and incentive distribution contracts contain vulnerabilities that could be exploited.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Engage reputable security firms for audits and formal verification of smart contracts.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit reports, formal verification reports, and test results demonstrating security properties.

checklist_items.title: Verify that all governance proposals are reviewed and approved by multiple guardians or decentralized consensus mechanisms
checklist_items.description: Implement multi-party approval or multi-signature schemes for governance proposals and cancellations to prevent single points of failure or malicious actions.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The timelock and guardian management mechanisms rely on single or insufficient approvals.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Establish multi-signature or multisig approval processes, and regularly monitor guardian activities.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Records of guardian approvals and multisig execution logs.

checklist_items.title: Verify that the system uses cryptographically signed messages for RFRV submissions and reviews
checklist_items.description: All RFRV submissions and decisions should be cryptographically signed and verifiable on-chain to prevent spoofing and repudiation.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The RFRV review process relies on off-chain messaging without verifiable signatures.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Require digital signatures from authorized representatives for all RFRV submissions and review decisions, stored on-chain.
checklist_items.evidence_required: On-chain records of signed messages corresponding to RFRV review actions.

checklist_items.title: Ensure secure key management practices for validators and guardian signers
checklist_items.description: Implement hardware security modules, multi-signature schemes, and operational security procedures to protect private keys used for block proposal, voting, and multisig approvals.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Private keys for validators and guardians are stored insecurely or are vulnerable to compromise.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Adopt hardware security modules, enforce multi-factor authentication, and conduct regular key audits.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Key management audit logs, hardware security module configurations, and access control policies.

checklist_items.title: Implement user education and official URL verification for dApps and interfaces
checklist_items.description: Educate users to only access official websites, verify contract addresses explicitly, and be aware of phishing risks in all web interfaces involving asset management.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Users do not verify the authenticity of the web interfaces or smart contract addresses.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Create and distribute security awareness materials, display verified URLs prominently, and include warnings in wallet interfaces.
checklist_items.evidence_required: User training records, webpage verification protocols, and user feedback surveys.

checklist_items.title: Secure RPC endpoints using encrypted transport and verify endpoint authenticity before connection
checklist_items.description: Use HTTPS, TLS, or other encryption protocols for RPC communication, and verify endpoint certificates to prevent MitM attacks.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: RPC endpoints are not secured and vulnerable to MitM attacks.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Enforce HTTPS for RPC, pin certificates, and educate users about verifying endpoint authenticity.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Server SSL/TLS configurations, verified endpoint certificates, and user compliance reports.

checklist_items.title: Regularly update and patch smart contracts and front-end interfaces to address known vulnerabilities
checklist_items.description: Establish a process for timely deployment of security patches, updates, and security best practices for all smart contracts and user interfaces.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Smart contracts and dApps may contain vulnerabilities that could be exploited if not regularly updated.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement a patch management process, monitor vulnerability disclosures, and conduct periodic code reviews.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Patch deployment logs, vulnerability scanning reports, and audit logs.

checklist_items.title: Implement monitoring and alerting for abnormal activities on critical smart contracts and governance channels
checklist_items.description: Set up real-time monitoring for suspicious transactions, unusual proposal activity, or access patterns indicative of attacks or compromise.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Lack of monitoring may delay detection of malicious governance actions or DoS attacks.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Deploy blockchain analytics, set thresholds for alerts, and define incident response procedures.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Alert logs, incident reports, and forensic analysis records.

checklist_items.title: Enforce strong authentication for forum RFRV submitters
checklist_items.description: Verify that the governance forum requires users to authenticate via wallets linked to their on-chain identity to prevent impersonation.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Governance Forum lacks strong authentication mechanisms to verify the identity of the user submitting the RFRV.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement strong authentication (e.g., linking forum account to on-chain identity, SSO)
checklist_items.evidence_required: Screenshot or audit log showing linked on-chain identity at login.

checklist_items.title: Implement on-chain verification of RFRV proposal authenticity
checklist_items.description: Develop procedures to verify that RFRV proposals are recorded on-chain with cryptographic signatures from legitimate project accounts.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The RFRV process might not have strong, verifiable attribution for proposals.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Require cryptographic signatures from verified project addresses for all RFRV submissions.
checklist_items.evidence_required: On-chain transaction logs confirming signatures from verified project accounts.

checklist_items.title: Secure storage and access controls for off-chain vesting data
checklist_items.description: Ensure that all off-chain vesting schedule data is stored in access-controlled, immutable, or cryptographically protected storage to prevent tampering.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The vesting data is stored with insufficient protections and could be maliciously altered.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Use smart contracts with access restrictions or cryptographically sealed storage for sensitive vesting data.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit logs showing access controls and data integrity mechanisms.

checklist_items.title: Implement multi-signature and role-based access control for Reward Vault administrative functions
checklist_items.description: Configure Reward Vault contracts to require multiple approvals for admin actions, avoiding single-point privilege escalation.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Reward Vault contract's access control for admin functions is flawed or insufficient.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Use multi-signature schemes and role-based authentication for critical administrative functions.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Smart contract audit reports demonstrating access control mechanisms.

checklist_items.title: Verify whitelist status before directing emissions
checklist_items.description: Ensure that the Reward Distributor or incentive directing functions include on-chain checks that target Reward Vaults are whitelisted and active.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The system may impose no or weak validation that reward vaults are whitelisted before emission.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Add on-chain whitelisting verification in emission distribution functions.
checklist_items.evidence_required: On-chain logs showing emission transactions with whitelist status validation.

checklist_items.title: Use hardware wallets for signing critical transactions
checklist_items.description: Require Reward Vault managers, Token Managers, and Validator operators to use hardware wallets or secure signing environments to prevent private key compromise.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Private keys associated with reward issuance or management might be compromised through common attack vectors.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Mandate and verify the use of hardware wallets or secure key management practices for all privileged signing.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Configuration audits, key management policies, and incident logs.

checklist_items.title: Establish secure communication channels for off-chain operations
checklist_items.description: Use encrypted, authenticated channels (e.g., TLS, digitally signed messages) for all off-chain coordination related to the Guardians, BGT Foundation, and RFRV review processes.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Off-chain communication channels among Guardians or Foundation members are insecure or susceptible to leaks.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement encrypted messaging, digital signatures, and access controls for off-chain communication.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit logs of communication channels, signed message records.

checklist_items.title: Implement strong user education for phishing and interface verification
checklist_items.description: Train users to verify the authenticity of website URLs, smart contract addresses, and interface elements before signing transactions, especially for staking, claiming, and bridge operations.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Users cannot reliably distinguish between legitimate and spoofed interfaces without proper training.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Develop and distribute security awareness content and best practices for interacting with blockchain interfaces.
checklist_items.evidence_required: User training completion records, simulated phishing test results.

checklist_items.title: Deploy and enforce DNS and domain monitoring for phishing sites
checklist_items.description: Monitor domain registration data, SSL certificates, and website content to detect and mitigate impersonation or phishing sites mimicking official infrastructure.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Phishing sites or malicious RPC/Interface providers can be set up to impersonate official channels.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Use trusted domain registries, implement domain monitoring services, and respond to impersonation reports.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Domain registration records, incident response logs.

checklist_items.title: Configure multi-signature and threshold controls for proposal creation and execution
checklist_items.description: Require multiple approvals (threshold multisig) within the governance protocol for proposal submission, modification, and execution to prevent single point of compromise.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Insufficient multi-party approval or threshold control for governance decisions allows single actor to submit or execute malicious proposals.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement multisig approval requirements on the governance contract for proposal actions.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Smart contract code, multisig approval logs.

checklist_items.title: Implement strong authentication for forum RFRV submissions linked to on-chain identity
checklist_items.description: Ensure that all users submitting RFRVs via the governance forum are verified through a secure, cryptographically verifiable on-chain identity to prevent impersonation.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Governance Forum lacks strong authentication mechanisms to verify the identity of the user submitting the RFRV.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement strong authentication (e.g., linking forum account to on-chain identity, SSO)
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit logs showing on-chain identity verification at submission.

checklist_items.title: Enforce on-chain verification of Reward Vault whitelisting status before accepting emission transactions
checklist_items.description: Ensure that the Reward Vault contract or distribution mechanism verifies the vault's whitelisting and active status on-chain before processing any emission directives or transfers.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Validator's transaction signing environment (e.g., wallet, RPC connection) can be compromised.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: On-chain verification of vault status before emission processing, with audit logs and alerts for suspicious activity.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Transaction logs showing verification steps and whitelisting status checks.

checklist_items.title: Secure validator key management with multi-signature and hardware wallets
checklist_items.description: Require that all validator keys used for scheduling emissions, proposing blocks, or any administrative actions are stored securely using hardware wallets and multisignature schemes to prevent key compromise.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The validator's private key can be compromised or leaked.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Use hardware security modules and multisig wallets for key storage, enforce operational security protocols.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Key management audit logs, multi-party approval logs.

checklist_items.title: Audit and verify reward calculation and distribution logic for Reward Vaults and $BGT emissions
checklist_items.description: Conduct comprehensive security audits and formal verification on the reward calculation, distribution, and emission logic within Reward Vault contracts and related components to prevent reentrancy, overflow, and unauthorized minting/extraction.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Reward Vaults contain exploitable flaws that can lead to unfair incentives or theft.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Third-party security audits, formal verification, and ongoing monitoring of reward distribution anomalies.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit reports, on-chain logs of reward distributions, anomaly reports.

checklist_items.title: Implement secure private key management for all operational accounts and validator keys
checklist_items.description: Establish operational procedures utilizing hardware wallets, multisignature schemes, and hardware security modules to store all critical keys involved in emission control, governance, and validator operations, reducing risk of private key compromise.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Validator2 private keys are vulnerable to theft or guesswork.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Enforce strict key management practices, deploy hardware security modules, and audit key access logs.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Key access logs, operational procedures documentation.

checklist_items.title: Rigorously test and audit smart contracts governing reward mechanisms, staking, and incentive distribution
checklist_items.description: Perform formal verification, security audits, and penetration testing on all smart contracts related to reward vaults, staking, and incentive distribution to identify and eliminate logical flaws, reentrancy vulnerabilities, and misconfigurations.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Reward Vaults and incentive contracts may contain vulnerabilities exploitable for financial gain or disruption.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Third-party security audits, formal verification, and continuous monitoring.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit reports, formal verification documents, and on-chain anomaly alerts.

checklist_items.title: Verify and implement strong access control and multi-signature procedures for admin functions in reward vaults and associated contracts
checklist_items.description: Ensure that all administrative functions such as pausing, parameter updates, and emergency measures are protected by multi-signature schemes, role-based access control, and timelocks to prevent unauthorized or malicious administrative actions.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Reward Vaults' admin functions could be misused if not properly secured.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement role-based access control, multisig governance, and timelocks.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Access control policies, multisig transaction logs, governance approval records.

checklist_items.title: Implement domain verification and certificate checks for all user-facing web interfaces to prevent spoofing phishing sites
checklist_items.description: Require users to only connect to verified, official websites and ensure all front-end interfaces for DeFi products are served over HTTPS with valid certificates, and that URLs are verified before user interaction.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Users may be misled into interacting with malicious interface sites.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Use official URLs, SSL certificates, and user education for verifying website authenticity.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Website validation reports, certificate disclosures.

checklist_items.title: Deploy anti-phishing and anti-spoofing browser extensions or wallet warnings for users accessing dApps
checklist_items.description: Utilize browser extensions, reputation services, or wallet alerts to warn or block users from interacting with known malicious or suspicious URLs or contracts, reducing the risk of phishing and spoofing attacks.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Users may fall victim to phishing or spoofing attacks when accessing dApps or signing transactions.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: User education, official communication channels, and security extensions.
checklist_items.evidence_required: User reports, extension alerts, phishing site blocklists.

checklist_items.title: Introduce transaction verification steps that show users detailed info before signing complex operations like redemption or swapping
checklist_items.description: Design wallet interfaces and transaction signing workflows to explicitly display all parameters and details, allowing users to verify correctness before signing, reducing tampering risks.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Users do not verify transaction details in their wallets before signing.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: UI/UX improvements, detailed transaction summaries, and user education.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Screenshots, user confirmation records.

checklist_items.title: Use hardware wallets and verify transaction details during signing for all cross-chain and reward operations
checklist_items.description: Require all participants to use hardware wallets with display verification for sensitive operations like bridge, minting, reward claiming, and emission signing to prevent tampering and impersonation.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Users' private keys can be compromised or malware-infected.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Promote hardware wallet usage, operational security training.
checklist_items.evidence_required: User setup policies, transaction verification logs.

checklist_items.title: Establish secure, encrypted, and authenticated RPC communication channels for node operators and wallet connections
checklist_items.description: Configure all RPC endpoints with TLS/SSL, mutual authentication, and encrypt all data in transit, to prevent MitM tampering and data leakage.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: RPC communication may be vulnerable to MitM or eavesdropping.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Use HTTPS, TLS, client certificates, and secure network configurations.
checklist_items.evidence_required: TLS certificates, network security policies.

checklist_items.title: Verify strong authentication mechanisms for BGT Foundation review actions
checklist_items.description: Ensure that the BGT Foundation uses cryptographic signatures or multi-factor authentication to validate review and decision submissions.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Weak access controls in the BGT Foundation's review process could be exploited to spoof or tamper with review decisions.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement cryptographic signatures and multi-party approval workflows for review actions.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit logs showing review actions signed by authorized representatives.

checklist_items.title: Implement on-chain audit logging for governance review activities
checklist_items.description: Require that all review and decision events of the BGT Foundation are recorded immutably on the blockchain to prevent repudiation and support accountability.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Lack of non-repudiation mechanisms allows actors to deny review actions.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Store review decisions as signed on-chain transactions with public-verifiable records.
checklist_items.evidence_required: On-chain transaction histories and signatures verifying the originator.

checklist_items.title: Secure communication channels among Guardians
checklist_items.description: Ensure all off-chain communication and coordination among Guardians regarding proposal cancellations are conducted over encrypted, authenticated channels to prevent information leakage and tampering.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Off-chain coordination channels are insecure and susceptible to interception or tampering.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Use end-to-end encrypted communication protocols and enforce operational security best practices.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Communication logs demonstrating encrypted channels and access controls.

checklist_items.title: Implement multisignature and threshold signatures for proposal cancellation
checklist_items.description: Require that proposal cancellations within the Timelock contract are authorized via multisignature approval (e.g., 5-of-9 signatures) to prevent privilege escalation or unauthorized cancellations.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Vulnerabilities in multisig verification logic could allow a single actor to bypass threshold requirements.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Use well-audited multisignature libraries and formal verification of threshold logic.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Smart contract code audits and verification reports.

checklist_items.title: Configure secure RPC endpoints and verify their authenticity before use
checklist_items.description: Users should connect only to official, verified RPC endpoints for wallet interactions to prevent spoofing and man-in-the-middle attacks.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Users connect to untrusted or malicious RPC endpoints, risking data interception and manipulation.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Distribute official RPC endpoint URLs through verified channels and educate users on verifying endpoint authenticity.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Official documentation and audit logs demonstrating endpoint verification procedures.

checklist_items.title: Enforce verification of transaction details in wallets before signing
checklist_items.description: Users should review and verify all parameters of blockchain transactions, such as recipient addresses and amounts, in their wallet interfaces before signing.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Users do not verify transaction parameters, leading to acceptance of tampered or malicious transactions.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement clear, user-friendly transaction summaries and warnings in wallets.
checklist_items.evidence_required: User confirmation logs and wallet UI snapshots showing verification prompts.

checklist_items.title: Implement comprehensive input validation and verification for cross-chain bridge transactions
checklist_items.description: Ensure bridge transactions are validated on-chain and off-chain to prevent tampering with parameters such as recipient addresses and amount fields.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Bridge transaction parameters can be altered by client-side manipulation before signing.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Use secure, validated transaction templates and enforce on-chain validation checks.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit reports and transaction logs demonstrating validation measures.

checklist_items.title: Establish secure upgrade and admin control practices for Reward Vaults
checklist_items.description: Reward Vault contracts should be governed by multi-signature or timelock mechanisms to prevent unauthorized upgrades or control changes.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Reward Vault administrative controls are vulnerable to compromise leading to privilege escalation or malicious configuration.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Apply multi-signature governance and timelock controls; review admin controls regularly.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Governance policy documents and smart contract code audits.

checklist_items.title: Enforce strong cryptographic authentication for forum users submitting RFRVs
checklist_items.description: Verify that only users with verified on-chain identities or secure authentication methods can submit RFRVs to prevent impersonation or spoofing. This mitigates threats where attacker impersonates a protocol or individual.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Governance Forum (Component 223) lacks strong authentication mechanisms to verify the identity of the user submitting the RFRV.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement strong authentication (e.g., linking forum account to on-chain identity, SSO)
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit logs showing verified identity enforcement measures.

checklist_items.title: Implement on-chain verification for governance proposal creation
checklist_items.description: Ensure that proposals to governance contracts require cryptographically verifiable signatures from authorized addresses, and that the contract enforces minimum token holdings or delegated voting power for proposal submission. This reduces risk of proposal threshold bypass or storage tampering.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: There is a vulnerability in the Governance Contracts (Component 212) that incorrectly checks or fails to check the proposer's $BGT balance/delegation.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Rigorous security audits of governance contracts focusing on proposal creation logic.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit reports verifying proposal creation checks enforcement.

checklist_items.title: Require multi-signature approval or threshold consensus for proposal cancellation
checklist_items.description: Implement multisig or threshold approval (e.g., 5-of-9 signatures) for proposal cancellation to prevent unauthorized or malicious cancellations by compromised guardian keys.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Timelock Contract's `cancel` function might contain a bug triggered under certain conditions or by specific proposal parameters.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Extensive auditing, formal verification, and testing of the Timelock Contract, particularly its cancellation logic.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit reports and formal verification documentation.

checklist_items.title: Secure Guardian private keys with hardware security modules and multi-signature protocols
checklist_items.description: Ensure that Guardian private keys used for multisig proposals are stored in hardware security modules (HSMs) or multi-signature setups with time locks and access controls, reducing risk of compromise and unauthorized proposal cancellations.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Timelock Contract correctly requires 5-of-9 signatures for a cancellation call.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement robust key management, hardware wallets, and operational security procedures for Guardians.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Configuration documentation and key management protocols.

checklist_items.title: Implement on-chain whitelisting and status verification for Reward Vaults before emission
checklist_items.description: Ensure that all Reward Vaults (Component 209) are verified on-chain against a maintained whitelist before any emission or incentive distribution, reducing risk of directing funds to malicious or uncontrollable vaults.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: A validator might maliciously or accidentally direct emissions to a Reward Vault (Component 209) that is not properly whitelisted or is faulty.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Strict on-chain verification that target Reward Vaults are whitelisted and active before emissions are processed.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Blockchain transaction logs showing whitelist checks.

checklist_items.title: Audit Reward Vault contracts for security and vulnerabilities prior to whitelisting
checklist_items.description: Conduct comprehensive security audits and formal verification of Reward Vault smart contracts (Component 209) before whitelisting or deployment to prevent exploits, reentrancy, or logic flaws.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Reward Vault smart contract deployed by a Protocol (Actor 5) contains exploitable flaws.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Security audits, formal verification, peer reviews, and bug bounty programs.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit reports, formal verification documents, bug bounty reports.

checklist_items.title: Implement access controls and role-based permissions on Reward Vaults
checklist_items.description: Configure Reward Vault smart contracts with role-based access controls, ensuring only authorized entities can manage incentives, set parameters, or execute admin functions. Enforce multi-sig or timelock for critical administrative operations.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Reward Vault contract's access control for functions like adding incentives or setting rates is flawed or bypassable.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement and audit RBAC, multisig, and timelock mechanisms, follow least privilege principles.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Access control configurations, audit logs.

checklist_items.title: Mandate secure deployment practices and security audits for Reward Vault contracts
checklist_items.description: Require all Reward Vault deployments to undergo formal security audits, use well-tested libraries, and follow secure development practices, including auditing for logic flaws and vulnerabilities.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Deployed Reward Vaults might contain exploitable flaws if not properly audited.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Require security audits, use verified libraries, deploy from secure CI/CD pipelines.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit certificates, deployment records.

checklist_items.title: Maintain immutable or access-controlled storage of investor vesting data
checklist_items.description: Store investor vesting schedules, claimed amounts, and related data in immutable smart contracts with restrictive access controls, preventing tampering and malicious modifications.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: If the vesting data is mutable by unauthorized parties, an investor's allocation or schedule could be maliciously altered.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Use smart contracts with access control for data modification, regular audits.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Smart contract source code, audit records.

checklist_items.title: Implement on-chain proof of token claim transactions for investor accountability
checklist_items.description: Ensure that token claim transactions are recorded on-chain with sufficient detail and attestations to prevent repudiation and allow unequivocal proof of claim execution.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Lack of immutable and verifiable proof of token claims could allow an investor to falsely deny receipt.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Design claim processes with on-chain recording, cryptographic signatures, and transparent logs.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Blockchain transaction records, event logs.

checklist_items.title: Use privacy-preserving techniques or minimize on-chain sensitive data for investor vesting details
checklist_items.description: Design vesting data storage to minimize exposure of confidential investor data, using aggregation, zero-knowledge proofs, or encrypted off-chain storage with on-chain commitments.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Confidential details of an Initial Core Contributor's $BERA allocation and vesting schedule are unintentionally disclosed.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Minimize detailed data on-chain, employ cryptographic privacy techniques, encrypt sensitive info.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Architectural design documents, implementation details.

checklist_items.title: Implement rate limiting and detection for RPC endpoint interactions
checklist_items.description: Configure RPC nodes to enforce rate limiting, IP filtering, and anomaly detection to mitigate DoS and MitM attacks, ensuring availability of network services for users.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The RPC endpoint is a single point of failure for the user's current session.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Deploy rate limiting, monitoring, anti-DDoS services.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Configuration records, monitoring alerts.

checklist_items.title: Require TLS/SSL encryption and verify server certificates for RPC communications
checklist_items.description: Ensure all RPC interactions between users and Berachain nodes occur over secure channels with valid server certificates to prevent MitM and tampering.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: RPC communication is not consistently or effectively using transport layer security.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Enforce HTTPS, verify server certificates.
checklist_items.evidence_required: SSL/TLS configuration documentation, verification logs.

checklist_items.title: Educate users to verify transaction details before signing and use hardware wallets
checklist_items.description: Promote the use of hardware wallets and careful manual verification of transaction parameters in trusted wallet interfaces to prevent tampering and impulsive signing of malicious transactions.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Users do not meticulously verify all transaction details in their wallet before signing.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: User education campaigns, wallet UI improvements.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Training materials, user feedback surveys.

checklist_items.title: Enforce strong authentication for forum RFRV submissions
checklist_items.description: Implement verification mechanisms such as wallet-based login or digital signatures to authenticate users submitting RFRVs.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Governance Forum (223) lacks strong authentication mechanisms to verify the identity of the user submitting the RFRV.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement strong authentication (e.g., linking forum account to on-chain identity, SSO)
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit log showing verified on-chain identities at RFRV submission time.

checklist_items.title: Establish secure communication channels among Guardians
checklist_items.description: Require Guardians to use secure, encrypted, and auditable off-chain communication channels to coordinate proposal cancellations.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Guardians coordinate or discuss potential cancellations off-chain before executing the multisig transaction.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Establish secure, confidential communication protocols and channels for Guardian coordination.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Configuration audit of Guardian communication channels and logs of internal discussions.

checklist_items.title: Implement comprehensive security audits for Reward Vault contracts
checklist_items.description: Conduct thorough security audits, including formal verification if feasible, for all Reward Vault smart contracts before deploying or whitelisting.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Reward Vault contracts might have vulnerabilities if not properly audited.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Require independent audits and formal verification of Reward Vault smart contracts.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit reports verifying the security and correctness of Reward Vault contracts.

checklist_items.title: Deploy Reward Vault contracts using secure, audited standards
checklist_items.description: Use standardized, thoroughly tested, and audited smart contract libraries or frameworks for deploying Reward Vaults.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Reward Vault smart contracts may contain exploitable flaws if not deployed from secure, standard templates.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Deploy contracts using verified, audited libraries like OpenZeppelin or equivalent.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Deployment documentation and audit records demonstrating adherence to secure standards.

checklist_items.title: Apply access controls with role-based permissions on Reward Vaults
checklist_items.description: Implement strict role-based access controls to restrict administrative functions of Reward Vaults to authorized, multi-sig protected accounts.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Reward Vaults may have flawed or overly permissive access controls, risking unauthorized control.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Use multi-signature wallets and role-based permissions for admin functions in Reward Vault contracts.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Access control policies and multisig configuration audits.

checklist_items.title: Secure private keys of Validator nodes and signing keys
checklist_items.description: Use hardware security modules (HSMs) or hardware wallets to manage validator signing keys and prevent unauthorized access.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Validator's private keys are vulnerable if stored or managed insecurely.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement hardware security modules and operational security best practices for validator key management.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Key management process documentation and hardware security audit reports.

checklist_items.title: Implement strict access controls for validator node environments
checklist_items.description: Enforce multi-factor authentication, RBAC, and network security policies for validator operational environments.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Validator systems may be misconfigured or susceptible to insider threats.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Configure access control policies enforcing MFA and RBAC, and audit configurations regularly.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Access control configuration audits and MFA implementation records.

checklist_items.title: Verify token contract listing before deposits or swaps
checklist_items.description: Implement checks within smart contracts or frontend interfaces to ensure tokens are listed on trusted lists or verified protocols before accepting deposits or enabling swaps.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: User interactions with unverified tokens can lead to transfer of malicious tokens.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Use verified token lists and enforce address whitelisting for token deployments and swaps.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit logs of token list updates and token address verification procedures.

checklist_items.title: Educate users to verify transaction details before signing
checklist_items.description: Promote user practices such as reviewing all transaction parameters in their wallet confirmation screens before signing, especially for critical operations like swaps, staking, or redeeming.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Users often neglect thorough review, leading to susceptibility to tampering or phishing.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Develop user guides and wallet UI improvements that emphasize transaction review.
checklist_items.evidence_required: User training materials, user feedback surveys.

checklist_items.title: Implement UI indicators for verified contract addresses
checklist_items.description: Wallet or dApp interfaces should display verified labels or green indicators for confirmed, trusted smart contract addresses to prevent interaction with spoofed contracts.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Users may interact with unverified or malicious smart contracts if not properly flagged.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Incorporate verified address markers and integrate with trusted contract registry.
checklist_items.evidence_required: UI/UX design documentation and verification logs.

checklist_items.title: Use HTTPS and certificate pinning for RPC endpoints
checklist_items.description: Ensure all RPC endpoints used by users' wallet interactions employ HTTPS with valid certificates to prevent MitM tampering.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: RPC endpoints without secure transport are vulnerable to MitM attacks.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Enforce HTTPS protocols and certificate pinning mechanisms in wallet software.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Config audits, certificate deployment records.

checklist_items.title: Implement rate limiting and DoS protections for RPC services
checklist_items.description: Deploy rate limiting, IP filtering, and distributed network infrastructure to protect RPC endpoints from flooding and service disruptions.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: RPC providers lack sufficient DDoS mitigation measures.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Configure rate limiting, anti-DDoS solutions, and infrastructure redundancy.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Network traffic monitoring logs and configuration documentation.

checklist_items.title: Verify whitelisted Reward Vaults before directing emissions
checklist_items.description: On-chain, enforce whitelist checks for Reward Vaults to ensure only approved vaults receive incentivization from Reward Distributors.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Validators might direct emissions to unverified or malicious vaults.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement on-chain whitelist verification with rigorous access control in Reward Distributor contracts.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Smart contract source code, whitelist configuration, and audit reports.

checklist_items.title: Implement multi-signature authorization for critical emission controls
checklist_items.description: Require multiple validators or governance approvals to modify $BGT emission directions or amounts, reducing the risk of malicious or compromised single key execution.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Single key compromise could allow spoofed or malicious emissions.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Deploy multi-sig or DAO governance procedures for emission management.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Configuration records of multi-sig setup and governance approval logs.

checklist_items.title: Use secure hardware wallets for critical signing operations
checklist_items.description: Validators and protocol administrators should perform signing with hardware wallets to prevent key extraction or tampering.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Private keys are vulnerable if stored on insecure systems or software wallets.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Mandate hardware wallet usage and secure key management protocols.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Operational procedures, hardware wallet audit logs.

checklist_items.title: Periodic security audits of smart contracts and infrastructure
checklist_items.description: Regular third-party security audits, code reviews, and formal verification of all smart contracts involved in PoL to identify and fix vulnerabilities proactively.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Reward Vaults may contain exploitable vulnerabilities if not routinely audited.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Schedule regular audits, encourage bug bounty programs.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit reports, bug bounty submission summaries.

checklist_items.title: Restrict admin functions to multisignature accounts in smart contracts
checklist_items.description: Design Reward Vaults and administrative contracts with role-based access controls and multisignature requirements for admin operations.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Unauthorized admin access could lead to malicious control over vaults.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Deploy multisig wallets, enforce role-based access control in smart contracts.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Access control policy documents, multisig wallet configuration.

checklist_items.title: Implement strong authentication for forum RFRV submissions
checklist_items.description: Ensure that only verified on-chain identities can submit RFRV proposals through the governance forum.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Governance Forum (223) lacks strong authentication mechanisms to verify the identity of the user submitting the RFRV.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement robust authentication methods such as on-chain identity verification or digital signatures.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit logs showing verified on-chain identities linked to forum submissions.

checklist_items.title: Enforce on-chain verification of reward vault whitelisting status
checklist_items.description: Ensure that the smart contracts governing reward vaults verify their whitelisted status before accepting emissions, preventing directed rewards to non-whitelisted entities.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Reward Vault (209) may not properly authenticate that the caller is whitelisted, or the whitelisting check is flawed.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement on-chain approval mechanisms with explicit whitelist checks and rigorous audits.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit reports confirming whitelist enforcement logic and transaction logs demonstrating these checks.

checklist_items.title: Secure private key management for Validator nodes
checklist_items.description: Ensure that Validator private keys used for block proposal, signing, and reward direction are stored securely using hardware security modules or multi-signature wallets.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Validator keys can be compromised if proper key management practices are not followed.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Use hardware wallets, multi-party signatures, and secure key storage solutions.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Key management procedures documentation, hardware wallet audit logs.

checklist_items.title: Implement multi-factor and hardware wallet authentication for user transactions
checklist_items.description: Enable users to verify critical operations (such as asset bridging, staking, or redemption) using hardware wallets and multi-factor authentication to prevent spoofing and tampering.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Users may be deceived by phishing or malicious interfaces, leading to unauthorized transaction signing.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Require hardware wallets and multi-factor authentication for critical transactions.
checklist_items.evidence_required: User confirmation logs showing hardware wallet sign-offs, security audit reports.

checklist_items.title: Set strict transaction verification in wallets with explicit confirmation of parameters
checklist_items.description: Wallets should display detailed transaction parameters (recipient, amount, contract address) and require user verification before signing, especially for swaps and bridge transactions.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Users may sign transactions without verifying transaction details, leading to tampering or misdirection.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement UI prompts that require explicit user confirmation of transaction details.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Screenshots of wallet prompts showing transaction details, user confirmation logs.

checklist_items.title: Use secure communication protocols (HTTPS, WebTransport) for RPC endpoints
checklist_items.description: Ensure all RPC endpoints used by users and validators are secured with TLS/SSL, and implement certificate pinning where applicable, to prevent MitM and tampering.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: RPC endpoints may be susceptible to MitM and tampering if not secured properly.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Enforce HTTPS with proper certificates, utilize VPNs or secure tunnels, and implement certificate pinning.
checklist_items.evidence_required: SSL/TLS configuration audits, network monitoring reports.

checklist_items.title: Implement rate limiting and anti-DDoS measures on critical dApps and contracts
checklist_items.description: Deploy rate limiting, CAPTCHA, or other anti-DDoS techniques on user interfaces and smart contract gateways to prevent flooding and DoS attacks that could disrupt operations.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Unprotected interfaces can be overwhelmed by malicious request volume.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Use firewalls, rate limiting, CAPTCHA, and monitor traffic for unusual activity.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Traffic logs, security audit reports.

checklist_items.title: Establish multisig governance for critical protocol upgrades and parameter changes
checklist_items.description: Require multiple signatures (e.g., 3 out of 5) for deploying new smart contracts, changing core parameters, or authorizing administrative functions, to prevent privilege escalation and unilateral control.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Single-party administrative controls have high risk of abuse or compromise.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement multisig with threshold, regular key rotation, and transparent governance protocols.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Multisig transaction logs, governance meeting records.

checklist_items.title: Conduct security audits and formal verification of all smart contracts
checklist_items.description: Regularly audit the code of Reward Vaults, Bridge contracts, and core protocol logic. Use formal verification tools to identify and eliminate vulnerabilities related to reentrancy, overflows, and access control flaws.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Unverified smart contracts may contain vulnerabilities exploited by attackers.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Partner with reputable audit firms, employ formal verification tools, and implement bug bounty programs.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit reports, formal verification results, bug bounty records.

checklist_items.title: Verify that the governance proposals undergo thorough review and validation before execution
checklist_items.description: Ensure that all proposals are subjected to multiple levels of review, including community and guardian oversight, to prevent malicious actions from being executed.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The governance process may lack stringent review and validation mechanisms, allowing malicious proposals to be executed.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement multi-layered review and approval workflows, including automated checks and guardian oversight.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Recorded governance proposal review logs and signatures.

checklist_items.title: Implement strong authentication measures for RFRV submission processes
checklist_items.description: Require that all RFRV submissions are verified via cryptographically secure signatures or on-chain identities to prevent impersonation and spoofing.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The RFRV submission process relies on weak or unverified identity verification mechanisms, making it susceptible to spoofing.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Use cryptographic signatures, verify identities via on-chain credentials, and employ secure submission protocols.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Verification logs showing signature authenticity and identity checks.

checklist_items.title: Secure off-chain communication channels among Guardians and BGT Foundation members
checklist_items.description: Establish encrypted, authenticated channels for Guardian coordination to prevent leakage of sensitive governance decision information.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Guardians coordinate off-chain and might leak information if communication channels are insecure.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Use end-to-end encrypted messaging, multi-party secure protocols, and access controls.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit logs and communication protocol documentation.

checklist_items.title: Implement multi-signature and timelock controls for governance proposal cancellations
checklist_items.description: Require multiple Guardian signatures and a time delay before executing proposal cancellations to prevent malicious or unauthorized cancellations.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Proposal cancellation relies on Guardian signatures which could be compromised or manipulated.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Use multisig wallets with threshold signatures and enforce timelocks on cancellation transactions.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Blockchain transaction logs demonstrating multisig and timelock enforcement.

checklist_items.title: Verify that the Reward Vault smart contracts have been audited and are free from common vulnerabilities
checklist_items.description: Conduct thorough security audits on Reward Vault contracts to identify and fix reentrancy, authorization, and economic exploits prior to whitelist approval.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Reward Vault contracts may contain vulnerabilities if not properly audited, enabling exploits.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Engage reputable security auditors, conduct formal verification, and perform bug bounty programs.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit reports, formal verification proofs, and bug bounty submission records.

checklist_items.title: Ensure that all smart contracts involved in $BGT issuance are up-to-date with security best practices and have been audited
checklist_items.description: Review and audit the smart contracts responsible for $BGT emission, distribution, and incentive mechanisms to prevent privilege escalation and reward manipulation.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Reward distribution and incentive mechanisms might have logical flaws or vulnerabilities.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Regular audits, production-level formal verification, and continuous monitoring of emissions and incentives.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit reports, monitoring dashboards, and transaction analysis records.

checklist_items.title: Implement strong on-chain identity verification for forum RFRV submissions
checklist_items.description: Ensure that the entity submitting an RFRV on the governance forum is verified via their linked on-chain identity to prevent spoofing.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Governance Forum lacks strong authentication mechanisms to verify the identity of the user submitting the RFRV.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement strong authentication (e.g., linking forum account to on-chain identity, SSO)
checklist_items.evidence_required: Screenshot or audit log showing linked on-chain identity at login.

checklist_items.title: Disable or limit public access to sensitive vesting data on-chain or off-chain storage
checklist_items.description: Minimize on-chain storage of personally identifiable or highly specific vesting details, or secure off-chain databases, to prevent accidental disclosure of contributors' confidential information.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The exact vesting terms for each individual Initial Core Contributor are considered confidential.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Minimize on-chain storage of detailed allocation and vesting schedule information or secure off-chain databases.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Review of on-chain and off-chain data storage policies and configurations.

checklist_items.title: Conduct comprehensive security audits of vesting smart contracts
checklist_items.description: Perform security audits focusing on authentication, authorization, and confidentiality properties of the vesting mechanism to prevent spoofing of vesting claims.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The vesting mechanism contains vulnerabilities that could be exploited to spoof claims.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Regular security audits, possibly including formal verification.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit reports, formal verification results.

checklist_items.title: Implement multi-factor authentication for proposal creation and voting
checklist_items.description: Require multiple factors (e.g., wallet signature + off-chain confirmation) to prevent spoofing, tampering, and unauthorized activities in governance proposals.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The governance process lacks robust mechanisms to verify the authenticity of proposal submissions and votes.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement multi-factor authentication and signature schemes.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Configuration documentation and verification of MFA implementation.

checklist_items.title: Verify that reward emissions are signed and authorized only by secure validator keys
checklist_items.description: Ensure that emission directives are signed with validated, secure private keys, and that the system enforces strict signature verification to prevent spoofing of reward distribution.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Validator keys may be compromised, leading to spoofed emission directives.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Use secure hardware wallets, multi-signatures, and validate signatures rigorously.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Key management practices, signature verification logs.

checklist_items.title: Enforce secure private key management and multi-signature requirements for validator activities
checklist_items.description: Implement robust key management practices, including hardware security modules and multi-sig controls, to prevent unauthorized signing and spoofing of reward emission instructions.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Validator private keys are vulnerable to theft or compromise.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement hardware wallets, multisig, and operational security policies.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Key management policy documentation, hardware wallet usage logs.

checklist_items.title: Audit access permissions for Reward Vault administrative functions
checklist_items.description: Review and verify that only authorized entities have privileges to modify incentive parameters or perform admin actions in Reward Vault contracts to prevent elevation of privileges.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Reward Vaults have flawed or insufficient access control mechanisms.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement role-based access control, audit current permissions.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Access control policies and audit logs.

checklist_items.title: Implement strict contract ownership and multi-signature admin controls for Reward Vaults
checklist_items.description: Secure administrative functions with multisig and timelocks to prevent unauthorized privilege escalation and malicious control over vault parameters.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Admin keys or controls are vulnerable to compromise.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Deploy multisignature and timelock mechanisms.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Deployment documentation, multisig setup details.

checklist_items.title: Implement strong authentication for RFRV submission processes
checklist_items.description: Ensure that only verified and authenticated entities can submit RFRV proposals, possibly by linking submissions to cryptographically verified on-chain identities.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Governance Forum lacks strong authentication mechanisms to verify the identity of the user submitting the RFRV.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement strong authentication (e.g., linking forum account to on-chain identity, SSO)
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit logs showing identity verification during submission.

checklist_items.title: Enforce on-chain verification of governance proposal signatures
checklist_items.description: Require that all governance proposals are signed cryptographically with verified on-chain identities before being accepted for voting, to prevent impersonation and spoofing.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The system does not currently verify that proposal signatures correspond to legitimate on-chain identities.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Deploy a protocol for signature verification linked to on-chain identity management.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Test cases verifying signature validation against known identities.

checklist_items.title: Validate whitelisted Reward Vaults before directing emissions
checklist_items.description: Implement on-chain checks to verify that any Reward Vault receiving $BGT emissions is on a trusted whitelist, to prevent directing funds to malicious or unapproved contracts.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Validators may direct emissions without verifying Vault whitelisting status, enabling misdirection or misuse.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Integrate whitelist validation logic into emission direction transactions.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit trail showing whitelist verification during emission transactions.

checklist_items.title: Secure private keys of activities with administrative privileges
checklist_items.description: Implement multi-signature management, hardware security modules, and operational best practices to protect private keys controlling admin functions in Reward Vaults, reducing risk of privilege escalation or impersonation.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Administrative controls in Reward Vault contracts may be vulnerable if private keys are compromised.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Use hardware wallets, multi-signature setups, and secure key storage procedures.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Key management policies and hardware deployment audits.

checklist_items.title: Conduct thorough security audits and formal verification of reward distribution mechanisms
checklist_items.description: Periodically audit smart contracts responsible for incentive distribution and reward calculations, including formal verification where feasible, to identify and mitigate logical flaws that could be exploited by malicious actors.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Reward distribution logic may contain vulnerabilities exploitable by a validator; existing audits may be insufficient.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Commission independent audits and formal verification of reward calculation contracts.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit reports and formal verification attestations.

checklist_items.title: Implement multi-factor authentication and strong access controls for governance systems
checklist_items.description: Enforce multi-factor authentication and role-based access controls on all governance proposal and decision-making interfaces, to prevent privilege escalation and unauthorized tampering.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Weak access controls in governance interfaces may allow unauthorized actors to tamper with proposals or decisions.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Deploy MFA and RBAC policies on all governance portals and systems.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Access logs demonstrating MFA enforcement and RBAC configurations.

checklist_items.title: Use official and verified RPC endpoints for wallet interactions and API calls
checklist_items.description: Encourage users and systems to connect only via approved, verified RPC endpoints, preferably with DNS protections and TLS, to prevent spoofing or man-in-the-middle attacks.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Users or systems might connect to malicious or unverified RPC endpoints, risking MitM attacks or data leaks.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Publish and maintain a list of official RPC URLs, educate users, and implement tool warnings.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Web audit logs, user reports, and monitoring data showing RPC verification adherence.

checklist_items.title: Implement on-chain whitelist verification for asset transfers and interactions
