checklist_items.description: Add smart contract logic to verify that any incoming asset transfer or interaction is from a whitelisted, trusted source, especially for vault management and token deposit/withdraw operations.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Validators or users may direct assets to malicious contracts or unverified vaults, risking loss or misallocation.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Integrate whitelist validation within smart contract functions handling asset transfers.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Smart contract audit reports showing whitelist enforcement.

checklist_items.title: Implement strong on-chain identity verification for RFRV submissions
checklist_items.description: Ensure that the system verifies the identity of users submitting RFRVs by linking their forum accounts to verified on-chain identities to prevent impersonation.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Governance Forum lacks strong authentication mechanisms to verify the identity of the user submitting the RFRV.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement strong authentication (e.g., linking forum account to on-chain identity, SSO)
checklist_items.evidence_required: Screenshot or audit log showing linked on-chain identity at login.

checklist_items.title: Establish secure communication channels for Guardians' governance review processes
checklist_items.description: Use secure, confidential channels (e.g., encrypted messaging, multi-party approval) for Guardians to coordinate discussions and decisions on proposals to prevent information leakage.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Guardians coordinate or discuss potential cancellations off-chain before executing the multisig transaction.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Establish secure and confidential communication channels for Guardian coordination.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Operational security protocol documentation or communication logs demonstrating secure channels.

checklist_items.title: Implement multisignature validation with strict thresholds for proposal cancellations
checklist_items.description: Configure the multisig scheme so that at least 5 out of 9 Guardian signatures are required, and audit this process to prevent compromise or bypass.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Timelock Contract's `cancel` function might contain a bug or be exploitable to bypass 5-of-9 signature requirement.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Rigorous smart contract audits, formal verification of multisig logic, secure code implementations.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit reports, formal verification results, multisig signature validation logs.

checklist_items.title: Secure and restrict administrative functions of Reward Vaults
checklist_items.description: Implement role-based access controls and multisignature mechanisms for all admin functions within Reward Vault contracts to prevent unauthorized privilege escalation.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Reward Vault contract's access control for functions like adding incentives or setting rates is flawed or bypassable.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement strong, multi-signature access controls, least privilege principles, audited contracts.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Access control policy documents, multisig setup verification, audit reports.

checklist_items.title: Configure smart contracts with proper fallback and emergency mechanisms
checklist_items.description: Design Reward Vaults, BeraHub, and related contracts with pause, emergency withdrawal, and upgrade functions governed by multisig and timelocks to mitigate DoS and upgrade risks.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Reward Vault smart contract could contain bugs or admin controls that can halt operations.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Use proven, audited contract templates with emergency controls governed by multisig/timelock.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit reports, code review documentation, governance control schemes.

checklist_items.title: Verify contract address authenticity before interaction
checklist_items.description: Implement user interface mechanisms and wallet warnings to ensure users verify the contract address matches the official deployed address, reducing spoofing and phishing risks.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: User cannot reliably distinguish a fake bridge interface from the legitimate one.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Official code repositories, domain verification, user education, wallet warnings.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Security notices, user awareness campaigns, verification logs.

checklist_items.title: Perform thorough security audits of bridge and minting contracts
checklist_items.description: Engage reputable auditors to review all cross-chain bridge and minting smart contracts for vulnerabilities, particularly in upgrade mechanisms and access controls.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The bridge or minting contracts could contain exploitable flaws.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Security audits, formal verification, bug bounty programs.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit reports, security certification documents.

checklist_items.title: Enforce secure key management and multi-signature procedures for validator keys
checklist_items.description: Use hardware security modules (HSMs), multisig signing, and regular key rotation for validator signing keys to prevent spoofing or privilege escalation in block proposal and signature processes.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Validator keys can be compromised or exploited to spoof block proposals.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: HSMs, multi-sig, key rotation policies, secure key storage protocols.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Key management policy documents, hardware security setup verification.

checklist_items.title: Implement transaction verification and final review in wallets or dApps
checklist_items.description: Design wallets or web interfaces to display all transaction details prominently and require user confirmation before signing, reducing tampering risks.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: User does not meticulously verify all transaction details before signing.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Wallet UI/UX improvements, transaction summary displays, user training.
checklist_items.evidence_required: UI design documents, user training materials, transaction confirmation logs.
